name: Addict
description: Vent to become invulnerable, or you'll die
extra:
As the Addict, you have a suicide timer. When it expires, you kill yourself.
The timer is indicated by the Vent Cooldown. When the Vent Cooldown is 0 seconds, you still have a short time to Vent.
If you don't make it, you die; if you make it, the Suicide Timer is reset.
Also after you Vent, no one can interact with you for a defined period.
After; the period is over, and you are immobilized for another defined period, and cannot Report any bodies.

name: Admirer
description: Choose a player to side with you
extra:
As the Admirer, admire a player to make them Crewmate aligned.
They'll win with Crewmates and not their original team.

You can only do this once per player.

name: Alchemist
extra: As the Alchemist, you brew potions when you complete tasks. The potion you made will show up under your role name with its corresponding description and instructions. You can get seven different potions, some with harmful or no effects. Vent to use the potion.

name: Altruist
description:
Revive a player
Vent to change between Revive and Report
extra:
As the Altruist, you can sacrifice yourself to revive a dead body using the «Report» button.
Note: If a dead player has left the game, you report that body normally.
Also revived player cannot report self dead body
Use the Vent button to change between Report & Revive.

name: Analyst
description: Gain extra info from your body reports
extra: As the Analyst, when you report a body, they will receive a clue message, which will tell the Analyst what the victim's role is. According to the Host's settings, the Analyst may know what the murderer's role is. Note: Analyst won't be Oblivious.

name: Archivist
description: Get information of everything that happens in a room
extra:
The Archivist can use the Unshift button once per round, and at the next meeting will receive information on what happens in that room. This includes kills, vents entered, tasks completed, and shapeshifts

Note: Archivist cannot use their kill button.

name: Astral
description: Do your tasks to win, but with a risk
extra: As the Astral, you can Vent to turn into a Crewmate ghost. The ghost can see everyone's roles, however they must complete a certain amount of tasks to return back to their original form. If someone calls a meeting when they are in Ghost form, they will die permanently. They can kill after completing their tasks.

name: Bastion
extra:
As the Bastion, bomb Vents to kill off Impostors and Neutrals.
Be careful though; Crewmates can also be killed with the bombs.

name: Benefactor
extra:
As the Benefactor, whenever you finish a task, that task will be marked. When another player completes the marked task, they get a temporary shield.

 Note: Shield only protects from direct kill attacks.

name: Bodyguard
extra: As the Bodyguard, if a player is about to be killed near the Bodyguard, the Bodyguard will prevent the kill and die with the murderer. The Bodyguard's skills will affect players of any team. When the Bodyguard becomes a Madmate, and the murderer is an Impostor, the Bodyguard will not activate the skill.

name: Captain
description: Sail with the Captain, lest Modifiers be abandoned.
extra:
As the Captain, with each completed task, the Captain gains the power to slow down a random non-Crewmate role. Crewmates can see ☆besides Captain's name.

If anyone betrays the Captain's trust by voting Captain out, they will lose an Modifier.

name: Celebrity
extra: As the Celebrity, all Crewmates see the kill-flash when the Celebrity dies (same as the Seer sees the kill-flash) and get a notice at the next meeting. The Impostors don't know anything about this.

name: Chameleon
description: Vent to disguise into your surroundings
extra: As the Chameleon, you can Vent to Vanish temporarily. You will still appear visible on your screen. Vent again to become visible.

name: Chief of Police
extra:
As the Chief of Police, you can recruit a player to be a Sheriff (only once per game).
Depending on the settings, you may recruit non-Crewmates or players without a Kill button.
You may suicide when you recruit a wrong player.

name: Cleanser
description: Erase all Modifiers of your vote target
extra: As The Cleanser, you can vote to erase the Modifiers of any target at the meeting. This erasure takes effect after the meeting ends. Depending on the settings, the cleansed player may never receive Modifiers again.

name: Constable
description: Create bonus meetings for extra power
extra: The Constable can vote themself to create a bonus meeting after the current one. The Constable will receive a certain amount of extra votes during a Tribunal. More Tribunals can be called during a Tribunal.

name: Copycat
description: Use your Kill button to copy a target's role
extra:
As the Copycat, you can use your Kill button to copy the target's role.

You can only copy some Crewmate roles.
If you try to copy a Madmate or Rascal, you become the Madmate variation of the target role.
If you target an evil with a Crewmate variant, you'll become the Crewmate variant.

Additionally, Your role will be set back to Copycat after every meeting.
Note You can't guess people in meetings.

name: Coroner
extra: As a Coroner, you can't report corpses; instead, after trying to report the corpse, you will see an arrow leading you to the killer. If someone calls a meeting, the arrows disappear. Depending on the settings, players can't report the body you found.

name: Corrupted
extra: As the Corrupted, once you complete your tasks, you will become a random Impostor role. You will still win with Crewmates.

name: Crewmate
extra:
As the Crewmate, your goal is to find and exile the Impostors.
Crewmates win by getting rid of all killers or by finishing all their tasks.

name: Crusader
extra:
As the Crusader, use your Kill button to crusade a player.
If that player gets attacked, you'll kill the attacker.

name: Cursebearer
extra:
(Crewmates [Ghost]):
As the Cursebearer, when you use your Protect button on a target, their role will be revealed to everyone.

name: Deceiver
extra: The Deceiver can sell the counterfeit to other players through the Kill button. If the counterfeit is sold successfully, the Deceiver will see a Shield Animation on their body as a reminder. The counterfeit will take effect after the end of the next meeting. If the player with no kill ability holds the counterfeit, he will kill himself immediately. If the player with the killing ability has the counterfeit, he will commit suicide when he tries to kill someone next time.

name: Deputy
description: Handcuff killers to increase their Cooldowns
extra:
As the Deputy, use your Kill button to handcuff a player.
The player who is handcuffed will have their next kill attempt treated as a handcuff break, and the Kill Cooldown will be reset.

If the target does not have a Kill button, then the handcuff was a waste.

name: Detective
description: Keep tabs on players and your supicions
extra: As the Detective, you can write down notes about each crime scene and interrogate suspects.

name: Dictator
description: Exile a player based on your judgment
extra:
When the Dictator votes for someone, the meeting will end on the spot, and the player they voted for will be ejected from the meeting. The moment the Dictator votes someone out, the Dictator will also die.
If the setting to use the command is on, the Dictator will have to use '/exp id' in order to exile someone. The Dictator will be able to vote normally.
The Dictator can survive after voting an Evil player if the setting is on.

name: Director
extra: The Director can use their kill button to Star a player. From then until the next meeting, they will be assigned the Super Star role. They will revert to their old role once the meeting is over.

name: Doctor
extra: As the Doctor, you can see the cause of death for all players. In addition, the Doctor can access Vitals wherever you are while he still has battery left.

name: Drone
extra: The Drone can protect players near themself for a certain amount of time by doing a task. While players are protected, if they do a task, the amount of time they are protected increases by 5 seconds.

name: Druid
description: Shapeshift into players to maybe kill them
extra: As the Druid, you can select a player with your kill button, then vent to temporarily transform into them. You can kill the same player after shapeshifting into them, but after doing so, you are stuck in their skin and if they are innocent you can no longer kill players.

name: Empath
description: Feel the vibes of a player.
extra: Use Sense Intent on a nearby player to feel their emotional state. Calm, Agitated, or Guilty - each reading hints at their alignment and recent actions, but never confirms it outright. If you are killed, your killer is marked with a lasting Burden curse.

name: Engineer
description: Use the vents to catch the <color=#ff1919>Impostors</color>
extra: As the Engineer, you may access the Vents while Comms Sabotage is inactive.

name: Enigma
extra: As the Enigma, you get a random clue about the killer each meeting. Depending on the settings, you may have to report the body to receive a clue. The more tasks you complete, the more precise the clues get.

name: Exorcist
description: Eliminate evils and purify the lobby!
extra: As the Exorcist, every time you do a task, nearby Impostors and Neutrals will be vaporized (dying instantly without a body).

name: Firefighter
extra: The Firefighter can do a task to put out a fire- automatically fixes any active sabotage.

name: Forensic Scientist
description: Analyze bodies to find killers and remove curses.
extra:
Report a body to collect a sample and analyze it ,if Analyze is successful the killer will be revealed in next meeting .
You can also vote a player to remove hexes and curses depending on host settings.

name: Fortune Teller
extra:
As the Fortune Teller, vote for a player in a meeting to get a clue to their role.
The clue will relate to their actual role.

When the Fortune Teller's tasks are complete, they will obtain the exact role rather than a clue!

Note: If the setting to give random active players as a hint is on, you cannot check the same player multiple times.

name: Ghastly
extra:
(Crewmates [Ghost]):
As the Ghastly, possess an unsuspecting person, after that choose a target for them, now they'll only be able to use their kill (or kill ability) on target until you possess someone else or possess time runs out.

name: Grenadier
extra: As the Grenadier, you can Vent to Flashbang players nearby, causing them to lose vision if they are an Impostor or, depending on settings, a Neutral.

name: Guardian
description: Complete your tasks to become immortal
extra: As the Guardian, you become immortal upon task completion. Guessers can't even guess you in meetings.

name: Guardian Angel
extra: As the Guardian Angel, you are the first Crewmate to die and can give Crewmates temporary shields.

name: Guess Master
extra: As the Guess Master, you will receive information about every attempted guess made during a meeting. You will be informed about the role the Guesser tried to guess, and you will also be notified in case of a misguess.

name: Hawk
extra:
(Crewmates [Ghost]):
As the Hawk, you can kill a limited amount of players decided by the Host, though there's a chance you miss, slicing someone multiple times increases the chances.

name: Hippie
extra:
Everyone can see the Hippie.
When the Hippie is killed, the killer will earn the Admired role, which turns them into a Crewmate team.
The Hippie will not be ejected.

name: Inspector
description: Validate the alignments of two players
extra:
As the Inspector, you can check if two players are in the same team or not. You will get an affirmation message if they are on the same team or a denial message if they are not on the same team.

All Neutrals and converted players are counted in the same team. Trickster counts as Crewmate, and Rascal counts as Impostor.
Checking command: /cmp [player id 1] [player id 2].

name: Investigator
extra: As an Investigator, you can use your Kill button to investigate someone. When you investigate someone, their name will appear in red if they possess a Kill button (Impostor/Shapeshifter basis) or light blue if they lack a Kill button (Crewmate/Engineer/Scientist basis). However, please note that the color of the names will return to normal when someone calls a meeting.

name: Jailer
extra:
As the Jailer, use your Kill button to lock a player in jail. During the next meeting, the jailed player cannot vote or get voted (the vote count will be 0). The Jailer may choose to execute the prisoner by voting for them. If the Jailer executes an innocent player, the Jailer loses the ability to execute for the rest of the game.
If the Jailer is evil, then they can execute anyone.
The Jailer has limited executions.

Note: Jailed players cannot be guessed or judged, and jailed players can only guess Jailer.

name: Judge
extra:
As the Judge, you can judge a certain player during the meeting. If the target is evil, the target will be killed (whether it is evil or not is set by the Host). If it is wrong, the Judge commits suicide.
Command for judgment: /tl [player id]
You can see the player's id before the player's name, or use the /id command to view the id of all players.
Judges can judge all players when they become Madmate.
In meeting the ability count shows how many trails you have in this meeting. Out of meeting the ability counts shows how many trails you have for the whole game.

name: Jury
extra: The Jury can put one person on trial. The party can decide to skip to save them or vote them to eject them. They cannot vote for other players. This ability can be used only once, and can be used again once tasks are completed.

name: Keeper
extra: As keeper, you can vote for someone to protect them from being ejected. You can only do this a configurable number of times.

name: Knight
extra: As the Knight, you have no tasks. They can kill anyone but only do it once the whole game.

name: Lazy Guy
extra: Lazy Guy has only one task. In addition, the Impostor's abilities can't affect the Lazy Guy, such as being a scapegoat for Anonymous, being marked by a Warlock or Puppeteer, and more. Lazy Guy will not have any Modifiers.

name: Lighter
description: Catch killers with your enhanced vision
extra:
As the Lighter, you can Vent to increase your vision temporarily.
You have increased vision both when lights are not out and when lights are out.
Use this power to catch sneaky killers!

name: Lookout
extra:
As the Lookout, you can see the ID's of every player at all times.
This allows you to see through Shapeshifts and Camouflages.

name: Mage
description: Spell evils and doom them to die!
extra: The Mage can use their kill button to spell a player. If they spell a Crewmate, the spell will be placed on themselves. If they spell an Impostor, Neutral, or Coven, the target will get the spell. All spelled players die at the end of the next meeting if the Mage is not dead.

name: Marshall
description: Finish your tasks to prove your innocence
extra:
As the Marshall, complete your tasks to reveal yourself to the rest of the Crewmates.
Other teams will not be able to see you.
However, Madmates CAN see you.

name: Mayor
extra: As the Mayor, you have extra votes. Depending on the settings, players can't see your extra votes, you can Vent to call a meeting at any time, or you can have yourself revealed as Mayor upon task completion.

name: Mechanic
extra: The Mechanic can use Vents at any time. They can also fix Reactors, O2, and Communications using only one side. You can fix Lights by flicking only one switch. Opening a door will open all doors in the map.

name: Medic
description: Cast a shield onto a player
extra:
As the Medic, you can place a shield on the target by using their Kill button. The Medic can only give one shield for the whole game. Depending on the settings, the target's shield can or cannot deactivate when the Medic dies. The Medic can also see if someone is trying to break the target's shield.
Depending on the Host's settings, the Medic or the target can see if the player has a shield (shown as a green cross「✚」next to the name).

name: Medium
extra: As the Medium, you can establish contact with a dead player after someone reports a dead body. The player who reports doesn't have to be the Medium. The dead player can answer once with a YES or NO to the Medium's question, which only the Medium will see (the dead player can use /ms yes or /ms no). Note: Medium won't be Oblivious.

name: Merchant
extra: As a Merchant, you sell a random Modifier to a random player for each task you complete. Each Modifier sold earns you money. If you have a certain amount of money, you can prevent the next killing attempt against you by bribing the murderer. The bribed player won't be able to kill you, but you don't know who it is. The money used is lost and not available for additional bribes.

name: Mole
description: <size=90%>Vanish and reappear, the Mole's game is crystal clear!</size>
extra: As the Mole, when you Vent, you stay in the Vent for 1 second. When you exit the Vent, you will spawn near a random Vent in the map (except the one you used).

name: Monarch
description: Give your Crew extra voting power!
extra:
As the Monarch, you can knight players to give them an extra vote.

You cannot knight someone who already has multiple votes.

Knighted players appear with a golden name.
If a knighted player is alive, the Monarch cannot be guessed or killed.

name: Mortician
extra: The Mortician can see arrows pointing to all dead bodies, and if the Mortician reports a body, they will know the last player the victim had contact with. Note: Mortician won't be Oblivious or Seer.

name: Neutralizer
description: Make a player unable to use their role for a round
extra: The Neutralizer can use their kill button to remove a player's role for a single round. They will be unable to do anything related to their role that round. Their role will be returned to them after the round is over

name: Nice Guesser
description: Guess <color=#ff1919>Impostor</color> roles in meetings to kill
extra:
As the Nice Guesser, you can guess the role of a certain player during the meeting. If it is correct, it will kill the target, and if it is wrong, Nice Guesser will suicide.
The guessing command is: /bt [player id] [role]
You can see the player's id before the player's name or use the /id command to view the id of all players.
Nice Guesser can guess Crewmate when become Madmate.

name: Nice Mini
description: No one can hurt you until you grow up.
extra: As a Nice Mini, your survival is crucial. You can't be killed until you grow up, and if you die or are evicted from the meeting before you grow up, everyone loses. This unique role adds a new dynamic to the game, where your survival is not just for your benefit but for the entire Crew's success.

name: Noisemaker
description: Send out an alert when killed
extra: As the Noisemaker, whenever you die, you will make a noise, and a visual indicator of your death appears on the screen so the Crewmates can run to catch the person who killed you red-handed (even if it’s not red).

name: Observer
description: You can see all Shield Animations
extra: As the Observer, you can see all Shield Animations caused by other players after the first meeting. The Shield Animations typically indicate a role ability, so look out for this.

name: Oracle
description: Vote a player to see their alignment
extra:
As the Oracle, you may vote a player during a meeting.
You'll see if they are a Crewmate, Neutral, or Impostor.
Depending on settings, there can be a chance that your result will be incorrect.

name: Overseer
extra: As the Overseer, you have minimal vision, but you can use your Kill button to reveal the role of a nearby player. A 「○」 will be displayed next to the revealed target after you use the Kill button on them, and you will also be scanning them (only you can see this). Stay near the target for a defined time to reveal his role; if you move too far away, the reveal will cancel.

name: Overthinker
extra: On each meeting, the Overthinker knows where each player was 10 seconds ago.

name: Pacifist
extra: As the Pacifist, when you Vent, they will reset the Kill Cooldown for every player with a Kill button. When they become a Madmate, this ability will only work on Crewmates.

name: Paranormal
description: Come back to life with your protect button
extra: As the Paranormal, you spawn as a normal Crewmate. When someone kills you, you spawn with a Protect button that can kill any player and revive you into a normal Crewmate directly.

name: Phantasm
description: You used to be Astral, but now you can kill
extra: As the Phantasm, you are the transformed version of Astral when you complete all your tasks.

name: Plumber
extra: When the Plumber is in a vent, no other players can use the vents.

name: President
description: You are in charge of the meeting
extra:
As the President, you have two abilities: End the meeting and Reveal identity.

+ Ability 1: End the meeting - Type /finish in meetings as President to instantly end the meeting.
+ Ability 2: Reveal identity - Type /reveal in meetings to reveal yourself. Revealing yourself will make it so every player can see that you are the President, and you will become unguessable after typing the command. However, after the President has revealed themselves, whoever killed the President will have their kill CD greatly reduced on their next kill.

name: Prosecutor
extra:
The Prosecutor can vote a player, and everyone's votes are immediately returned.
Each player can either vote Skip or the player that was voted. They cannot vote for anyone else.
Vote Skip to vote normally.

name: Protector
extra:
As the Protector, whenever you finish a task, you get a temporary shield. The shield lasts until you are attacked, or when a meeting ends.

 Note: Shield only protects from direct kill attacks.

name: Protester
extra: If the Protester has a large number of people nearby, all of the players will kill any Impostors in the group. This will cause several bodies to spawn.

name: Psychic
description: One of the red names is <color=#ff1919>evil</color>
extra: The Psychic can see the names of several players highlighted in red during the meeting; at least one of them is evil. The Psychic will correctly see all Neutrals and Killing Crewmates displayed as red names when becoming a Madmate.

name: Raven
description: Travel to crime scenes to retrieve information
extra: When someone is killed, their exact location of where they were killed is marked. The Raven must travel to this location to receive more information about the kill. The information can include the victim's name, the victim's role, if the killer is dead or not, or the killer's role.

name: Retributionist
extra:
As the Retributionist, you can kill a limited amount of players after your death.

Use /ret [player ID] to kill.

name: Reverie
description: With each kill, your Cooldown decreases
extra:
As the Reverie, you can kill, but your Cooldown starts high.

It increases if you kill a Crewmate and reduces otherwise.
Depending on the Host's setting, you may misfire on reaching the maximum Kill Cooldown, and your target dies with you. 

You win with other Crewmates.

name: Santa
description: Give gifts to the Nice and the Naughty
extra: As the Santa, you can give gifts to players- if they are nice (crewmate) they get a shield, and if they are naughty (impostor), their next kill gets shielded!

name: Savior
description: Choose a player to protect every round
extra: As the Savior, you can choose a player to protect every round. After a meeting, the player will no longer be protected.

name: Scientist
extra: As the Scientist, you can see Vitals at any time, showing you who is alive and dead.

name: Sentinel
extra: As the Sentinel, you can report a body to kill the body's killer. You will report normally after your ability uses are used.

name: Sheriff
extra: As the Sheriff, you have no task. The Sheriff can kill Impostors (according to the Host settings, the Sheriff can also kill Neutrals). If the Sheriff tries to kill a Crewmate, the Sheriff will kill himself. The Sheriff can kill anyone when he becomes a Madmate (also according to the Host settings).

name: Snitch
description: Finish your tasks to find the <color=#ff1919>Impostors</color>
extra: After the Snitch completes all tasks, they can see the Impostor's names displayed in red on the meeting. When the Snitch has only one task left, the Impostors will see a「⚠」mark next to the name of themselves and the Snitch. When a Snitch becomes a Madmate, the「⚠」mark turns red.

name: Spiritualist
description: Be guided by the ghostly life
extra: As the Spiritualist, you get an arrow pointing towards the ghost of the last meeting's victim. There is an option for the arrow to disappear and reappear in intervals. Try to notify the ghost about your ability if you can; if they are on your side, they may lead you to an evil role so you can eject them. Be careful, as evil roles can do the same for Crewmates.

name: Spy
description: You know who interacts with you
extra:
As the Spy, when someone uses their Kill button on you (any ability used through the Kill button), you'll see their name in orange for a few seconds.
Note: If a Crewmate used their ability on you, you'll also see them with an orange name!
Note: If you cannot use left, you won't see orange names!
Note: If the Kill button interaction is blocked, the player's Cooldown will reset to 10s'

name: Super Star
extra: As the Super Star, there will be a star logo next to their name, so everyone knows who the Super Star is. The Super Star can only die when the murderer is alone with the Super Star (regular kills only). In addition, the Guessers can't guess the Super Star.

name: Supervisor
description: See the state of everyone's tasks!
extra: When the Supervisor's tasks are completed, they can view everyone else's task status, including how many they have and how many remain. If a player does not have tasks, the Supervisor will know.

name: Survivalist
description: Win the showdown to make crewmates win
extra: If Imposters win when you are alive , a countdown will begin and the Imposter team will try and hunt you . Survive the showdown and lead crew to victory

name: Swapper
description: Swap the votes of two players
extra:
As the Swapper, you can swap votes in meetings.

To swap votes, use '/sw [player ID]' twice.

Player ID's are displayed next to player names in meetings, but you can also use /id to get a list of all player ID's.

Note: Depending on the Host's settings, you can exchange your own votes.

name: Task Manager
extra:
As the Task Manager, your objective is to help the Crewmates complete tasks as fast as possible.
Everytime you complete a task one random Crewmate will have one of their tasks completed.
You will be rewarded with a random Modifier if any Crewmate finishes all their tasks.
Any tasks completed will affect you if marked by other roles.
Depending on settings you might get information on what visual tasks were completed in past rounds.

name: Technician
extra:
As the Technician, you have three main abilities.

You can see all player ID's at all times.
This allows you to see through Shapeshifts and Camouflages.

You can see all Shield Animations caused by other players after the first meeting. Shield Animations typically indicate a role ability.

You can get notfied whenever any player Vents or Shapeshifts, Shapeshifts used for abilities do not notify the Technician.

name: Telecommunication
extra: As the Telecommunication, you are notified when anyone uses Cameras, Vitals, Door Logs, or Admin.

name: Time Manager
description: Increase meeting time by doing tasks
extra: As the Time Manager, when you do more tasks, the longer the meeting time will be. When the Time Manager dies, the meeting time will return to normal. When the Time Manager becomes a Madmate, the skill changes to reducing the meeting time instead of increasing it.

name: Time Master
extra:
As the Time Master, use the Vents to mark everyone's position.
When using the ability again, every alive player will rewind to the marked positions.

During the ability duration, the Time Master gains a time shield, which protects them from death.

name: Tracefinder
description: Sense the location of dead bodies
extra:
As the Tracefinder, you can access Vitals at any time.
In addition, you get arrows pointing to dead bodies, with a delay set by the Host.

name: Tracker
extra: As the Tracker, press your Tracker button on a player to track their location via the map for a limited amount of time.

name: Transporter
description: Do tasks to swap two players' locations
extra: Whenever the Transporter completes the task, two random players will switch positions, but if there are not enough players left, nothing will happen. Note: Players in a Vent will not be selected.

name: Valkyrie
extra: When the Valkyrie is killed, they will be teleported to a random vent and have a set amount of time to kill their killer. If they do not kill their killer within the timer, they die. The killer will be alerted when the Valkyrie is killed.

name: Ventguard
extra: As the Ventguard, you can enter Vents to block them. No one can enter blocked Vents, except Crewmates, if the setting is on. Blocked Vents can be resets every meeting.

name: Veteran
description: Alert to kill anyone who interacts with you
extra: As the Veteran, you can enter the alert state by Venting. If a player tries to kill the Veteran in the alert state, the Veteran will kill the murderer instead. Veteran will see a Shield Animation on their body and a text above their head as a reminder when they enter and exit the alert state.

name: Vigilante
description: Not the hero we deserved but the hero we needed
extra:
As the Vigilante, you are tasked with eliminating potential threats to the Crewmates, but if they mistakenly kill an innocent Crew member, they become a Madmate driven by guilt and remorse.

 Note: Gangster cannot convert Vigilante into Madmate.

name: Villager
extra: The Villager receives one message per meeting about where a random player was most recently.

name: Visitor
description: Visit players each meeting to track them.
extra:
Each meeting, choose players to visit next round - either by casting your vote on them, or with the /visit {player id} command, depending on the host's settings.

At the start of the following meeting, you'll automatically receive a report on everyone you visited:
- The rooms they passed through, in order
- How many tasks they completed
- How many kills they got

Use /visits at any time to see your most recent report again.

If one of your targets is killed while you're visiting them, you may also learn the killer's role and any modifiers they have, depending on host settings. Depending on those same settings, the killer might be warned that you saw them, or you and the killer may each get an arrow pointing to one another.

name: Warden
extra:
(Crewmates [Ghost]):
As the Warden, alert someone of nearby danger, additionally giving them a temporary speed boost.

name: Webweaver
extra: When the Webweaver vents, they set a trap. Anytime anyone vents in the vent the Webweaver trapped, they will get locked in that vent for X amount of time.

name: Witness
description: Find out if someone killed recently
extra: As the Witness, when you use your Kill button on someone, you will know if they killed in the last X seconds or not. (X depends on the settings).

name: Abyssbringer
extra: As the Abyssbringer, you can place black holes. Black holes will suck in players and kill them when colliding with them.

name: Agent
description: Add members to your team with each kill
extra: As the Agent, when your kills are reported, the reporter will become a Madmate.

name: Anonymous
description: Force a player to report a body
extra:
As the Anonymous, you can Shapeshift to force your target to report whoever you killed this round.
If you killed nobody that round, the target will report their own dead body as if they had died.
Note: This does not work on Lazy nor Lazy Guy, and this ability will work regardless of whether the body can normally be reported.

name: Anti Adminer
description: Know when players are near devices
extra: As the Anti Adminer, you at any time can find out if there are Crewmates or Neutrals near Cameras, Admin Table, Vitals, DoorLog, and/or other devices. Note: Anti Adminer does not know if the player uses the device while near it. They only know that someone is near the device.

name: Arrogance
description: With each kill you make, your Cooldown decreases
extra: As the Arrogance, your Kill Cooldown reduces with each successful kill of theirs.

name: Bane
description: Mark an area to kill players
extra: As the Bane, use your Shapeshift button to mark an area. The first person who walks in that area dies.

name: Bard
description: Poem's grace, murder's trace, a rhythmic dance in a dark embrace.
extra: When a Bard is alive, the exile confirmation will display a sentence composed by the Bard. Whenever the Bard completes a creation, the Bard's Kill Cooldown will be permanently halved.

name: Blackmailer
extra:
As the Blackmailer, when you Shift into a target, you will blackmail that player. This means that during the meetings, they won't be able to speak.

Note: If someone is already blackmailed, blackmailing another person un-blackmails the current person.

name: Blinder
extra: When the Blinder kills, all nearby players are fully blinded and cannot move for a set duration.

name: Bloodmoon
extra:
(Impostors [Ghost]):
As the Bloodmoon, attack the enemies to make them drip blood, this means they will die in a time set by the Host, and will be aware of it.

name: Bomber
extra: As the Bomber, use the Shapeshift button to self-explode, killing players within a certain range. But as a price, the Bomber will also die. Note: All players will see a kill flash when the Bomber explodes.

name: Bounty Hunter
extra:
As the Bounty Hunter, if you kill your assigned target (indicated by the arrow if you have one), your next Kill Cooldown will be shortened.
If you kill anyone other than your target, your next Kill Cooldown will be increased. The target swaps after a certain amount of time.

name: Butcher
extra: As the Butcher, your kills, including passive ones, leave multiple dead bodies on targets, which can be a bit confusing when reporting. Here's the rule: the killed target must repeatedly display the animation of being killed, which cannot be skipped, and they cannot participate in the meeting normally during this period. If the Butcher kills the Avenger, the Avenger will revenge everyone in anger.

name: Camouflager
extra:
As the Camouflager, when you Shapeshift, all players start to look the same. This state ends when the Camouflager reverts its Shapeshifting. It's important to note that the skills of Communication Sabotage Camouflage, and the skills of the Camouflager can be superimposed.
This skill will be invalid if a meeting is held during the skill activation of the Camouflager.

name: Chronomancer
extra: As the Chronomancer, you have a charge bar which indicates when the slaughter is ready. When it is at 100% the next time you kill someone, you go into slaughter mode, meaning you can kill indefinitely until your bar runs out of charge. Otherwise, you have a normal KCD.

name: Cleaner
description: Report bodies to make them unreportable
extra: As the Cleaner, you can use the Report button to clean up any dead body they come across (including those they kill). If the cleanup is successful, the Cleaner will see a Shield Animation on their body as a reminder (only visible to himself). The cleaned-up body cannot be reported (including Bait).

name: Consigliere
description: Discover the roles of other players
extra:
As the Consigliere, you can reveal the roles of other players using your Kill button.

Single click: Reveal role
Double click: Kill

If you run out of reveal uses, your Kill button functions normally.

name: Councillor
extra:
As the Councillor, you can kill players during a meeting like a Judge.
When killing in a meeting, those kills will appear as a trial from a Judge.

The kill command is /tl [player id]
You can see the player's id before the player's name, or use the /id command to view the id of all players.
Depending on the settings, Councillor will suicide when he judge his teammates.
Converted Councillor can judge freely.

name: Crewpostor
extra:
(Madmates):
As the Crewpostor, you kill the nearest player whenever you finish a task.

name: Crow
description: Steal the roles of your victims
extra: When the Crow kills a player, they will take their role for the rest of the round. The Crow will also be assigned the Madmate Modifier, and their original role will be returned at the end of the next meeting

name: Cursed Wolf
description: You survive a few kill attempts
extra: As the Cursed Wolf, when you're about to be killed, the Cursed Wolf will curse the killer to death. (The Host sets the maximum of times you can counterattack)

name: Dazzler
description: Reduce the vision of the Crew
extra: As the Dazzler, you can reduce the vision of the target of your Shapeshift permanently. When you die, their vision will turn back to normal.

name: Deathpact
extra:
As the Deathpact, You Shapeshift to mark your targets for a deathpact.
If you have enough players marked for a deathpact, they must meet within a specific period; if they fail to do so, they die.
If a marked player dies before the deathpact becomes complete, the pact is withdrawn.

name: Detonator
extra: As the Detonator, you can use your kill button to freeze a player. Using the unshift button you can kill the player and everyone around them. If you do not shapeshift in time, your target will be released. Double click to kill normally.

name: Deviator
extra: The Deviator can use their unshift button to temporarily be protected from attacks. They will kill anyone who tries to attack them.

name: Devourer
description: Consume the skin of the Crew
extra: As the Devourer, use your Shapeshift button to change the appearance of the target of the Shapeshift permanently. Additionally, when each player's appearance changes, you will have your Kill Cooldown reduced by a defined number of seconds. If the Devourer dies or gets voted out during a meeting, the player's appearance will change back to their normal appearance.

name: Disperser
extra: As the Disperser, you can use the Shapeshift button to teleport all players to random Vents.

name: Diviner
description: Kill your killer to defy death
extra: As the Diviner, when someone tries to kill you, you will block the kill, and you will teleport to a random Vent. You will have a limited time to kill your killer. If you succeed in doing so, you live. If the time runs out before you kill your killer, you die permanently. If you try to kill someone else other than your killer, you will die.

name: Dollmaster
extra: As the Dollmaster, you can temporarily take control of any player by using the <color=#ff0000>Shapeshift</color> button and to make them do your deeds!

name: Double Agent
description: Plant bombs on players in meetings
extra:
As the Double Agent, you cannot access the Kill button. However, you can vote for someone in a meeting to pass a bomb onto them, which can only be done one player at a time. Once the meeting has finished, the bomb will activate and explode in a set amount of time.
Note: when you pass the bomb onto someone in a meeting, you can vote afterward.

Additionally depending on settings the Double Agent can diffuse <color=#696969>Bastion</color> and <color=#F4A460>Agitator</color> bombs when Venting.

The Double Agent can change roles when they are the <color=#ff1919>Last Impostor</color>, depending on the settings the role can be a <color=#ee43c3>Admired Impostor</color>, <color=#ff1919>Trickster</color>, <color=#BA2E05>Traitor</color>, or stay as the Double Agent.

name: Dragon
extra: Use the kill button to set a player on fire. They will be aware that they are on fire. After a certain amount of time, the player will die. The fire can spread among players, when a player gets close to a player that is on fire, they will also catch on fire.

name: Eraser
description: Erase the role of your vote target
extra:
As the Eraser, you can vote for any target at the meeting to erase the target's roles, and the erasure will take effect after the meeting ends. Note: Players with erased skills will always be considered a vanilla role, including the game result page.
A target can only be erased once (including OIIAI)

name: Escapist
description: Shift to mark places and warp back to them
extra:
As the Escapist, you can mark a location with the Shapeshift button. Shapeshift again to teleport back to the marked spot.
Marked location resets upon every teleport.

name: Evil Guesser
description: Guess <color=#8cffff>Crewmate</color> roles in meetings to kill
extra:
As the Evil Guesser, you can guess the role of a certain player during the meeting. If correct, the target dies. If wrong, the Evil Guesser dies.
The guessing command is: /bt [player id] [role]
You can see the player's id before the player's name or use the /id command to view the id of all players.

name: Evil Hacker
extra:
As the Evil Hacker, you can get last-minute Admin information at the meeting beginning.
Unoccupied rooms are not shown.
A '★' marks rooms with Impostors.
Rooms with dead bodies are marked with the number of bodies.
Example: ★Cafeteria: 3 (DEAD×1).

name: Evil Mini
description: No one can hurt you until you grow up
extra: As the Evil Mini, you are unkillable until you grow up and have a very long initial Kill Cooldown, which gets drastically shortened as you grow up.

name: Evil Tracker
extra: As the Evil Tracker, you can track other players, the Evil Tracker can Shapeshift into someone to switch the tracking target to the Shapeshift target (you will immediately Unshift after performing Shapeshift). The arrow below the Evil Tracker's name indicates the direction of the target. When the Evil Tracker's teammate kills, the Evil Tracker will see a kill flash.

name: Fireworker
extra:
As the Fireworker, you can Shapeshift to place Fireworks up to the maximum amount the Host sets.
When you are the last Impostor and all Fireworks have been placed, Shapeshift again to detonate them and kill everyone in their radius, including you.
If you kill all players with your Fireworks, it's considered an Impostor victory.

name: Fury
extra:
As the Fury, use your Shapeshift button to enter Rage Mode.
Rage Mode changes the Fury their speed and Kill Cooldown for a set duration of time.

Additionally there is a setting to reveal when the Fury enters Rage Mode to everyone.
Without the use of Rage Mode, the Fury acts like a regular Impostor.

name: Gangster
extra: As the Gangster, you're a powerful character that can recruit a player to a Madmate by using their Kill button. If the recruitment is successful, both the Gangster and the target will see the Shield Animation on each other as a reminder (only visible to each other). The remaining number of available recruits is displayed next to the Gangster's name (the Host sets the maximum). If the Gangster tries to recruit players who cannot be recruited, such as Neutrals or some special Crewmates, they will kill the target normally instead. When the Gangster has no remaining recruitments, they can only make normal kills from that point on.

name: Godfather
description: Convert players to Refugees by voting
extra:
As the Godfather, you vote someone to make them your target.
In the next round, if someone kills the target, the killer will turn into a Refugee or Madmate.

name: Gravedigger
extra: The Gravedigger can use their kill button to send a player to a random part of the map, then kill them.

name: Greedy
extra: As the Greedy, your kills with odd and even kills will have different Kill Cooldowns. Greedy's Kill Cooldown is reset every meeting, and Greedy's first kill is always odd.

name: Hangman
description: I will decide when your life will end
extra: As the Hangman, during the Shapeshifting, you use a unique killing method-strangling. This method ignores any status of the target, such as the shield of the Medic, the Bodyguard's protection, the Super Star's skills, etc. The strangled player will not leave a dead body, nor will it trigger any of its skills. For example, Veteran kill back (including additional roles), and Seer will not be prompted.

name: Harbourer
description: Store roles to use the abilities yourself
extra: When the Harbourer is attacked, they will store the role that attacked them in an inventory. They can swap between each role's ability by using the Unshift button. When they use their kill button, the ability of the role they have equipped will be used. The Harbourer cannot guess. Equip the Harbourer role to kill normally.

name: Hoarder
extra: As the Hoarder, use your Unshift button to temporarily restrict tasks from being done. Each task done will reduce your kill cooldown by 1sec.

name: Impostor
extra:
As the Impostor, your goal is to simply kill off the Crewmates.
You can Sabotage and Vent.

name: Inhibitor
extra:
As the Inhibitor, you can only kill when there is not a Critical Sabotage active.

If Light or Comms Sabotage is active, then you can kill.

name: Instigator
extra: As the Instigator, it's your job to turn the Crewmates against each other. Each time a Crewmate gets voted out in a meeting, if you are alive, an additional Crewmate who voted for the innocent player will die after the meeting. The Host determines the number of additional players dying.

name: Investor
description: Complete tasks to shorten your Kill Cooldown
extra:
(Madmates):
As the Investor, when you compete a task, your future Kill Cooldown reduces a certain amount set by the Host. Venting will turn you into an Impostor called Rich. The Rich has a set Cooldown that is reduced by the number of tasks you have done.

name: Kamikaze
description: Kill players with a suicidal mission
extra: As the Kamikaze you can single click to mark players. Double-click to kill normally. When you die, all marked also die, with death reason Targeted.

name: Kidnapper
extra: As the Kidnapper, you may select a target via your kill button, then unshift to teleport them to you and kill them. Double click to kill normally.

name: Killing Machine
description: You can ONLY kill, but low Cooldown
extra:
As the Killing Machine, you have a very short Kill Cooldown with tiny vision. However, you cannot Vent, Sabotage, Report, nor call Emergency Meetings.

Note: You will bypass any shields, killing Bait and Beartrap won't take any effect

name: Lightning
extra: As the Lightning, you cannot kill normally. Instead, your Kill button quantizes targets, which activates after a delay, causing the next person they encounter to kill them. Those who are actively quantized show a「■」next to their name. Additionally, those who have been quantized die if they survive until the end of a meeting. There is a setting to quantize your killer.

name: Ludopath
extra:
As the Ludopath, your Kill Cooldown is randomized.

Minimum it can be is 1 second, while the maximum is your default Kill Cooldown.

name: Lunger
extra: As the Lunger, you cannot kill normally. Instead, you can use your unshift button to lunge into the direction you're walking. Everyone in the way dies. You have a normal kill cd. But if you dash while standing, you will dash into heaven (you just suicide).

name: Lurker
description: Reduce your Kill Cooldown by venting
extra: As the Lurker, you can jump into a Vent to reduce your Cooldown by a certain number of seconds. After you kill, your Cooldown resets to its original value.

name: Magnet
extra: The Magnet can mark one player, and then mark another to send the second player to the first player's spot. Double click to kill normally.

name: Marksman
description: Set up your partners to have free kills!
extra: The Marksman can mark a player with their kill button. When another impostor kills the player, the impostor's kill cooldown will not be reset. Double click or be the last remaining impostor to kill normally.

name: Mastermind
extra:
As the Mastermind, you can use your Kill button on a player once to manipulate them. The manipulation does nothing if the target doesn't have a Kill button. But if the target does have a Kill button, whoever you manipulate will be told after a delay that they got manipulated and must kill someone in a limited time to survive. If the time limit expires or a meeting gets called before killing someone, they die.
Double click on someone to kill them normally.

name: Mercenary
extra: As the Mercenary, you must kill within your deadline, as shown by your Shapeshift Cooldown (which you cannot use). If you fail to kill, you die.

name: Meteor
description: Summon a meteor strike on target
extra:
Use your kill button to plant a bomb on your target which will explode after a certain period set by host . 
Double click to kill normally

name: Miner
description: Warp to your last used Vent by Shifting
extra: As the Miner, you can use the Shapeshift button to teleport back to the last vent you were in.

name: Minion
extra:
(Impostor [Ghost]):
As the Minion, you can temporarily blind non-Impostors.

name: Morphling
description: You can only kill while Shapeshifted
extra: As the Morphling, you are a Shapeshifter but cannot kill while not Shapeshifted.

name: Nemesis
description: Kill when you're the last Impostor
extra:
As the Nemesis, you can only kill if you are the last Impostor.
If you are dead, you can use the command /rv [ID] to kill the player whose ID you typed. Use /id to show the ID's of all players, or look next to their names.

name: Ninja
description: Mark a target, then Shift to kill
extra: As the Ninja, you can use your Kill button to mark a target (single click) or kill normally (double click). You may then Shapeshift to teleport to the marked target and kill them.

name: Nuancer
extra:
Your killing method is Random. 
When you use your Kill Button on someone one of the following events happen with equal probability.
 Normal kill.
 Delayed Kill like Vampire.
 Curse like witch.
 Explosion like Bomber.
 You can suicide(if enabled).

name: Parasite
description: Help the Impostors kill the Crew
extra:
(Madmates):
As the Parasite, you are an Impostor that does not know the other Impostors.

You may Kill, Vent, Sabotage, whatever.
Just know that you are an Impostor.

name: Pathogen
description: Shift to make a player constantly perform the shapeshift animation
extra: The Pathogen can Shift to make a player constantly perform the shapeshift animation. They will shift until the next meeting.

name: Penguin
extra:
As the Penguin, you can restrain the target by pressing the Kill button and drag it around.
While dragging, the target dies by pressing the Kill button again or after a certain period.
Press the Kill button twice for a direct kill.

name: Phantom
extra:
As the Phantom, you can press your Vanish button to go invisible to escape a kill. You can click your Appear button if you want to become visible before the timer runs out or not.
Note: You will make a smoke cloud whenever you go invisible and become visible. So make sure you are in a safe area where no one will see you.

name: Pitfall
extra: As the Pitfall, use your Shapeshift button to mark the area as a trap. Players who enter this area will be immobilized quickly, and their vision will be affected.

name: Possessor
description: Possess and lead <color=#8cffff>Crewmates</color> away from others
extra:
(Impostors [Ghost]):
As the Possessor, you can possess players when others aren't in the Alert Range. Lead the possessed player as far as possible from other players in the Focus Range. Once the possession duration is up, the possessed player will be killed if others aren't in the Focus Range. If you run into another player in the Alert Range while possessing, the Possessor will immediately unpossess.

name: Professor
extra: The Professor can use their shapeshift button to reset a specific player's tasks. They gain ability uses with each kill.

name: Propagandist
extra: As the Propagandist, you can kill normally using your kill button with a double click. By single clicking a player, you will steal their vote for the round and they will not know.

name: Puppeteer
extra:
As the Puppeteer, you can use your Kill button to Puppeteer (single click) or kill normally (double click).
Those you Puppeteer will kill the next non-Impostor they touch. Depending on options, Puppeteered targets will also die once they kill.

name: Quick Shooter
description: Store ammo to offset Kill Cooldown
extra:
As the Quick Shooter, when your Kill Cooldown is over, you can use the Shapeshift button to store a bullet. 
After a successful kill, if the QuickShooter still has bullets remaining, your Kill Cooldown will reset to zero and will immediately consume one bullet. 
Depending on the Host's settings, QuickShooter's ability may be restricted by the Shapeshift Cooldown.

name: Ragnarok
extra:
The Ragnarok can use the Unshift button to blind everyone for a certain amount of time. When the blindness is over, one random player will receive the Valhalla modifier.
When the Ragnarok kills the Valhalla, their cooldown will not be reset.

name: Reckless
description: Each time you kill is a gamble
extra: The Reckless has a chance to kill the nearest additional player with every kill, but also has a chance to alert the original target of a failed kill.

name: Refugee
description: Help the Impostors kill off the Crew
extra:
(Madmates):
As the Refugee, you were either:
 -An Amnesiac who remembered an Impostor
 -A killer who killed the Godfather's target.
 -A Romantic whose partner was an Impostor
 -Or an Imitator that imitated an Impostor.

Now your job is to help the Impostors kill the Crewmates.

name: Rich
description: Lower Kill Cooldown from your investments
extra:
(Madmates):
As the Rich, you are the transformed version of Investor when you enter a Vent.

name: Rift Maker
description: Two rifts I trace, touch 'em to warp space
extra:
As the Rift Maker, you can Shapeshift to create a Rift. You can teleport from one Rift to another by touching the area where the rift was created. Trying to vent will kick you out, therefore destroying all the rifts.

Note: Up to two rifts can be placed at a time; if you try to place a third, it removes the first one.

name: Rogue
extra: As the Rogue, after killing a player, you gain a massive speed boost

name: Saboteur
description: You can only kill during Sabotages
extra:
As the Saboteur, you can only kill when there is a Critical sabotage active.

If Reactor or O2 Sabotage is active, then you can kill.

name: Scavenger
extra: As the Scavenger, your kills do not leave dead bodies behind. In addition, if the victim is a Bait, no self-report will be made.

name: Shapemaster
description: Swiftly kill with no Shapeshift Cooldown
extra: As the Shapemaster, you have no Shapeshift Cooldown.

name: Shapeshifter
extra: As the Shapeshifter, you can Shapeshift into other players. It is obvious when you Shapeshift or revert Shifting.

name: Shapetricker
description: Trick other players with your egg color
extra: As the Shapetricker, the color of your Shapeshift egg will always be the color of the shapeshift target.

name: Shovel
extra: The Shovel can use their Unshift button to enter the closest vent to them at any point, no matter how far they are from a vent.

name: Sniper
description: Snipe players from a distance by Shifting
extra:
As the Sniper, you can shoot players from far distances.
You have to Shapeshift twice to make a successful snipe.
Imagine an arrow pointing from your first Shapeshift location towards your Unshift location.
That will be the direction in which the snipe will be made.
The snipe kills the first person in its path.
You cannot kill people normally until you use up all your ammo.

name: Soul Catcher
description: You swap places with your Shift target
extra: As the Soul Catcher, you can use the Shapeshift button to swap places with your target as long as they are not dead, in a Vent, swallowed by Pelican, or in a similar odd state.

name: Staller
description: Your kills take too long to report
extra: When the victims of the Staller are reported, the report is delayed by a certain amount of time.

name: Stealth
description: Killing blinds everyone in the room
extra: As the Stealth, when you kill, players in the same room are blinded for a short time.

name: Stunner
extra: The Stunner can use their shapeshift button to flash bang someone and temporarily blind them.

name: Sun
description: Burn players while you are risen!
extra: As the Sun, when you are alive, after every meeting a random non-Impostor player will die. If you run out of ability uses, a player will not die. You gain a certian amount of ability uses with each kill.

name: Swooper
extra: As the Swooper, you can Vent to Vanish temporarily. You will still appear visible on your screen. Vent again to become visible.

name: Threat
description: Kill someone without them knowing you killed them
extra: When the Threat kills someone, the target doesn't die, instead they don't even get alerted by the kill. When a dead body is reported or if there's a emergency meeting, the player will suddenly die.

name: Time Thief
extra: As the Time Thief, when you kill a player, the meeting time will be reduced by a certain amount of time. If the Time Thief dies, the meeting time will return to normal.

name: Trapmaker
description: Create your own dead body as a trap!
extra: As the Trapmaker, you can Unshift to create your own dead body, then immediately revive yourself. The Trapmaker can do this only once per round. When someone reports this dead body, they will die.

name: Trapster
extra:
As the Trapster, you have a unique method of killing. By initiating a body report, the Trapster can eliminate the player attempting to report the body the Trapster killed.
Note: If Trapster kills the Bait, the Trapster will die immediately.

name: Trickster
extra:
As the Trickster, you function as a regular Impostor but with one key difference.
You appear as a Crewmate to Crewmate roles.

The Sheriff cannot kill you.
Psychic does not see you as evil.
Snitch cannot find you.

name: Twister
extra:
As the Twister, you can use Shapeshifting to swap the position of all players randomly. The swap happens twice, once when you start your Shapeshift and once when you return to your original appearance.
The Twister itself will not swap places with anyone, and players in vents will not teleport.

name: Underdog
description: Start killing on a low player count
extra: As the Underdog, you cannot kill until there's a certain amount of players alive.

name: Undertaker
description: Teleport dead body to a marked location
extra:
As the Undertaker, when you Shapeshift, you mark a location. Your kills will then teleport to the marked location.
After every kill and meeting, your marked location will reset.

After every teleported kill, you will freeze for a configurable amount of time

name: Vampire
extra: As the Vampire, your kills are delayed. This means that your target still dies even if a meeting is called first. However, if you bite a Bait, you kill normally and report the body. Depending on the settings, you can use double trigger (bite players - single click, kill normally - double click).

name: Vindicator
description: Use your extra votes to kill everyone
extra: As the Vindicator, you have extra votes like a <color=#204d42>Mayor</color>.

name: Viper
description: Dissolve the bodies of your kills
extra: When you kill, the body of your target will slowly dissolve into nothing.

name: Visionary
description: You see the alignments of the living
extra:
As the Visionary, you see the alignments of living players during a meeting.
The following information will be displayed on the players:
- The Red name indicates the Impostors.
- The Cyan name indicates the Crewmates.
- The Gray name indicates the Neutrals.

name: Warlock
description: Curse <color=#8cffff>Crewmates</color> then Shift to make them kill
extra:
As the Warlock, you can Curse up to one other player at a time.
When you Shapeshift, if you have Cursed a player, they kill the nearest person, which, depending on settings, can include you or other Impostors.
You can kill normally while Shapeshifted.

name: WildShot
description: Use your kill button to kill random players.
extra:
As the WildShot when you use your kill button on someone , the kill will be blocked and a random non-imposter will be killed.
Double click to kill normally.

name: Wildling
extra:
As the Wildling, you can Shapeshift but cannot Vent.
When you kill, you temporarily become immune to attacks.

name: Witch
description: Spell Crewmates to kill them in meetings
extra:
As the Witch, you can use your Kill button to Spell (single click) or Kill normally (double click).
During the next meeting, the spelled target(s) will have a 「†」 next to their name visible to everyone. Unless you die by the end of that meeting, all Spelled targets will die.

name: YinYanger
extra: As the YinYanger, you can use your Kill button one time to pick your Yin and then a second time to choose a Yang. When those two players meet, they'll kill each other. When Yin & Yang have been chosen, you can kill normally.

name: Zombie
extra: As the Zombie, you have a short Kill Cooldown but moves very slowly and has very little vision. Zombie can not be voted out by anyone other than the Dictator, and the movement speed of Zombie will gradually slow down as they make kills or time passes.

name: Abzorbaloff
description: Absorb souls and make them kill players
extra: The Abzorbaloff can kill players. When they kill a player directly, that player is added to a list of dead players that do deeds for them. When they kill again, each player in said list will kill a player within range of the kill.

name: Agitator
extra:
As the Agitator, your premise is essentially Hot Potato.

Use your Kill Button on a player to pass the bomb.
This can only be done once per round.

The player who receives the bomb will be notified when receiving said bomb, in which they need to pass it to another player by getting near a player.

When a meeting is called, the player with the bomb dies.

If trying to pass to Pestilence or a Veteran on alert, the bombed player dies instead.
Optionally, the Agitator cannot receive the bomb.

name: Amnesiac
description: Remember the role of a dead body
extra:
As the Amnesiac, use your Report button to remember a target and get its role.
To balance the game, you will not be able to Vent after remembering your role if you can't Vent as Amnesiac.'

name: Arsonist
extra:
As the Arsonist, you can douse a player by using your Kill button on the player and following them for a few seconds. When the dousing starts and it's successful, a Shield Animation will happen as a reminder (only visible to themselves). When the Arsonist has doused all surviving players, the Arsonist can Vent to start the fire and win alone.

If the player name shows 「△」, that means they are being doused;
if the player name shows 「▲」, it means they have been completely doused.
Depending on the setting, Arsonist may start the fire anytime. But if he fails to kill everyone, he loses.

name: Artist
extra: As the Artist, you can single click on a player to paint them gray, similair to Devourer. Double click to kill normally.

name: Assassin
description: Choose your own team by killing
extra:
As the Assassin, after you kill for the first time, certain things will happen:
If you kill a Crewmate, you become an Impostor.
If you kill a Neutral, you become a Neutral Killer.
If you kill an Impostor, you become a Sheriff.

name: Atoner
description: Kill quickly but with a risk
extra: As the Atoner, you can kill people with a low kill cooldown. However, after each kill, you have an increased chance to die.

name: Baker
description: Feed players bread to become Famine
extra: (Apocalypse): As the Baker, you can use your Kill Button on a player per round to give them bread. Once a set amount of players are alive with bread, you become Famine. If the Bread gives additional effects and the setting is on, then you can Vent to change the bread that you give out. Bread Effects: Reveal: Reveals the target's role to the Baker (stays the whole game) Roleblock: Resets the target's Kill Cooldown when they try to use their Kill Button Barrier: Gives the target a Barrier that is only known to the Baker (Barrier is removed after the meeting)

name: Bandit
extra:
As the Bandit, you can use your Kill button one time to steal a player's Modifier and twice to kill. Depending on the settings, you may instantly steal the Modifier or after the meeting starts. After the maximum number of steals is reached, you will kill normally. Additionally, if there are no stealable Modifiers on the target or the target is Stubborn, you will kill the target.

Kill everyone to win.

Note: Cleansed, Last Impostor, and Lovers cannot be stolen.
Note: If Bandit can Vent is on, Nimble will become unstealable.

name: Bankrupt
extra:
As the Bankrupt, you are a Neutral with no win condition.
Bankrupt is a utility role.

name: Beholder
description: Use your Rays to target players
extra:
The Beholder can use their shapeshift button to target a player. Any of the following 4 things might happen. When they use their ability, they lose the ability to kill for the rest of the round.
1- The player could freeze in place and not be able to move until a meeting starts.
2- The player could instantly die without a body.
3- The player could be blinded for the round.
4- The player could lose their skin.

name: Berserker
extra:
(Apocalypse):
As the Berserker, you level up with each kill.
Upon reaching a certain level defined by the Host, you unlock a new power.

Scavenged kills make your kills disappear.
Bombed kills make your kills explode. Be careful when killing, as this can kill your other Apocalypse members if they are near. 
After a certain level, you become War.

name: Blade
extra: The Blade can use the unshift button to freeze in place, and the next person to walk near the blade will die without a body. The Blade can kill normally while its ability is not active. Its ability will last for a few seconds after the first player is killed.

name: Blood Knight
description: Killing gives you a temporary shield
extra: As the Blood Knight, you win when they're the last killing role alive, and the amount of Crewmates is lower or equal to the amount of Blood Knights. The Blood Knight gains a temporary shield after every kill, making them immortal for a few seconds.

name: Catalyst
extra: The Catalyst can set another person's kill cooldown to 0. Win with anyone but the Crewmates.

name: Collector
extra: As the Collector, when you vote for a player, for each other player that voted for them, you gain a point. When you collect the required votes, the game ends, and you win alone, even if you voted a Jester or Executioner's target out.

name: Communist
description: Give the lobby a Communist revolution
extra: The Communist can turn other players into Communists. When a Communist is killed, the most recent player to be recruited is returned to their own role. Everyone knows when at least one Communist is alive. Turn everyone into Communists to win!

name: Contaminator
description: Contaminate everyone to kill them later
extra: As the Contaminator, you start out as an Engineer and can contaminate rooms by Venting in them. Anyone who is near is immediatly contaminated and the Contaminator can see this through a mark. Each meeting, the Contaminator can choose to swap to Massacare Mode permanently. In Massacare Mode, the Contaminator will gain a Kill button and will be able to kill freely with low Cooldown ignoring any and all Shields, OIIAI, effects of Coven etc... but can ONLY kill players who are contaminated and will misfire when they try to kill someone else. The Contaminator can do tasks when in Contamination M ode to gain ability uses.

name: Cultist
extra:
As the Cultist, your Kill Button is used to Charm others, making them win with you. To win, charm all who pose a threat and gain the majority.
Depending on settings, you may be able to charm Neutrals, and those you Charm may count as their original team, nothing, or a Cultist to determine when you win due to majority.

name: Cursed Soul
description: Snatch souls and steal the win
extra:
As the Cursed Soul, you steal the victory if you survive to the end of the game.

You can steal the win from a Jester or Executioner.

Additionally, you can steal the Souls of other players.
Soulless players win with you and count as dead.

name: Dark Fairy
description: Convert ALL players, via your tasks!
extra:
As the Dark Fairy, you can mark tasks to <color=#4B0082>Darken</color> other players. <color=#4B0082>Darkened</color> players know the Dark Fairy, depending on the settings set by the host.
To win, Darken as much players as possible and gain the majority.

Depending on the settings you may <color=#4B0082>Darken</color> Neutrals.
Those you <color=#4B0082>Darken</color> may count as their original team, nothing, or a Dark Fairy to determine when you win due to majority.
The Dark Fairy & <color=#4B0082>Darkened</color> team win together.

name: Death
extra: (Apocalypse): Once the Soul Collector has collected their needed souls, they become Death. Death kills everyone and wins if Death is not ejected by the end of the next meeting. A configurable amount of extra meeting time will be given on the meeting Death transforms to have more discussion to find Death. You are invincible, and your presence is announced to everyone at the meeting after you transform.

name: Demon
extra: As the Demon, you kill by draining health. You see health in percentage near everyone's name, and every attack you make drains a percentage from that health without the victim knowing. Once you drain your victim's health to 0, they die. You win if you are the last one standing.

name: Developer
description: Assign custom roles to other players
extra: The Developer can sell new roles to other players using its kill button. The Developer will win if any of its customers are winners at the end of the game.

name: Dodo Bird
extra: When the Dodo Bird is killed, they will win if their killer wins.

name: Doomsayer
extra:
As the Doomsayer, you can guess the role of a certain player during the meeting.
If the Doomsayer guesses a certain number of roles (the number depends on the Host settings), then he wins.
The guessing command is: /bt [player ID] [role]
You can see the player's id before the player's name, or use the /id command to view the id of all players.

name: Doppelganger
extra:
As the Doppelganger, use your Kill button to steal a player's identity (their name and skin) and then kill your target. Double click to kill normally.

Kill everyone to win.

Note: You cannot steal the target's identity when Camouflage is active.

name: Dreadsteed
description: Keep reviving but at a cost
extra:
As the Dreadsteed, after you die, you are revived after the next round with a negative effect. These effects depend on how many times you've been revived. The Dreadsteed wins with the winning team if it's alive at the end of the game.

1st Revive: Lower speed.
2nd Revive: Fragile is assigned.
3rd Revive: Blinded.
4th Revive: Die if anyone gets near you.
You die permanently after the 4th revive.

Additionally, when you finish your tasks, your negative effects will be reset to as if you were never revived.

name: Duck
extra: The Duck can do a task to blind a random player for a certain amount of time and reset their kill cooldown. The Duck wins with anyone besides the Crewmates.

name: Entity
extra: When the Entity clicks their kill button, it "jams" the target's ability, meaning they won't be able to use their kill button ability. The Entity successfully "haunted" that player. They need to haunt a specific number of players to win. Haunts will be removed after a long period of time.

name: Executioner
extra: As the Executioner, you have an execution target, indicated by a diamond symbol「♦」next to their name. If the execution target is killed, the Executioner's role will change to Crewmate, Jester, or Opportunist depending on the game settings. However, if the execution target is voted out in the meeting, the Executioner wins. Note: Jester, Executioner, and Innocent can win together.

name: Extremist
description: Win with the extreme, not with the Neutrals
extra: Wins with the crewmates OR impostors. Does not win with Neutrals.

name: Falcon
description: Scar players while in Attack Mode
extra: The Falcon can use their Unshift button to enter Attack Mode. While in Attack Mode, the Falcon has a faster speed, and can use their kill button to Scar a player, which makes the player unable to report bodies, use their kill button, or do tasks. This player is also slowed, and they will be killed at the beginning of the next meeting. Use your kill button outside of Attack Mode to kill normally.

name: Famine
extra: (Apocalypse): Once the Baker has a set amount of people with bread alive, they will become Famine. If the Famine does not get voted out after the meeting, then they will become Famine, and every player without bread will starve (excluding other Apocalypse members). After this starvation of everyone without bread, Famine can use their Kill Button to starve any remaining players, which will kill those players right before the next meeting. You are invincible, and your presence is announced to everyone at the meeting after you transform.

name: Follower
description: Follow a player and help them
extra: As the Follower, you can use your Kill Button on someone to start following them and can use the Kill Button again to switch the following target. If the Follower's target wins, the Follower will win along with them. Note: The Follower can also win after they die.

name: Gastlighter
description: Steal the win by gastlighting a player
extra: The Gastlighter can select one player for the game, and if that player wins, the Gastlighter wins on its own.

name: Glitch
extra:
As the Glitch, you can hack players (single click) or kill normally (double click).
Those who have been hacked cannot kill, Vent, or report for the hack duration.
Additionally, calling a Sabotage other than doors will have no effect and will instead disguise you as a random player. You cannot disguise during or after Sabotages.
To win, be the last player alive.

name: God
extra: As the God, you know everyone's role from the beginning. If you live until the end of the game, you steal the win, i.e., everyone else loses, and you win.

name: Godzilla
extra: As the Godzilla, you can destroy random rooms by using your unshift button. The Godzilla can also kill normally depending on host settings. Be the last one alive to win.

name: Gunslinger
extra:
As the <color=#ffd700>Gunslinger</color>, use your kill button to mark a target each round. You will shootout duel your target the next meeting.

When the meeting starts, the target gets a text notification and <size=3><color=#ffd700>¤</size></color> symbol. A configurable shootout countdown will instantly start.

When the countdown reaches 0, a system message saying <color=#ff1919>SHOOT!!</color> is sent to the <color=#ffd700>Gunslinger</color> and target simultaneously. The first to type the <color=#007FFF>/shoot</color> command after the <color=#ff1919>SHOOT!!</color> indicator, wins the duel. The loser dies.

Typing <color=#007FFF>/shoot</color> before the indicator kills you.
Winning as the <color=#ffd700>Gunslinger</color> gives you a point.

TIP: Pretype the /shoot message.

name: Hacker
extra: The Hacker can use their kill button to target a player. The Hacker can use their shapeshift button to murder the targeted player without a body at any time. The death reason will be Targeted.

name: Hater
extra: As the Hater, you have no Kill Cooldown. However, depending on the settings, you can only kill Lovers and other Recruiting Roles and Modifiers. Killing anyone else will make you suicide. You win at the end of the game with the winning team if none of the killable roles are alive. You will not be Lovers.

name: Heir
description: Follow someone to be their successor
extra: As the Heir, you have a target marked with a yellow diamond. When the target dies, you will take their place as their role.

name: Huntsman
description: Kill your targets for a low Cooldown
extra: As the Huntsman, you are given a certain number of targets that reset every meeting. If you successfully eliminate one of your targets, your Kill Cooldown goes down permanently by the set amount. However, if you kill someone not one of your targets, your Kill Cooldown permanently increases by the set amount. A colored name indicates your targets.

name: Imitator
extra:
As the Imitator, use your Kill button to imitate a player.

You'll either become a Sheriff, a Refugee, or some Neutral.

name: Infectious
extra:
As the Infectious, your job is to infect as many players as you can.

If you infect all the killers, you can outnumber the Crew and win the game.

If you die, all the players you've infected will die after the next meeting.
If they achieve your win condition before then, you can still win.

name: Innocent
description: Get someone ejected by making them kill you
extra: The Innocent can use their Kill button to plant any player, and the planted target will immediately kill the Innocent. If the target gets voted out in the meeting, the Innocent wins. Note: Jester, Executioner, and Innocent can win together.

name: Jackal
extra:
As the Jackal, you win if you are the last player alive. Additionally, you may recruit using the Kill button. If the target is not one you can recruit, you have run out of uses, or you don't have the option to recruit, then you will kill people normally (i.e., don't use Kill buttons in front of others thinking it'll recruit). If the target has a Kill button and the option to turn into a Sidekick is on, they will become a Sidekick. Otherwise, they will gain the Recruit Modifier if the option to give the Recruit Modifier is on.
Depending on the settings, when Jackal was killed, a Sidekick will be randomly selected as the new Jackal.
Recruit may be selected if no Sidekick is alive.

name: Jester
extra: As the Jester, when you get voted out, the Jester wins the game alone. If the Jester is still alive at the end of the game, the Jester loses. Note: Jester, Executioner, and Innocent can win together.

name: Juggernaut
description: With each kill, your Cooldown decreases
extra:
As the Juggernaut, your Kill Cooldown decreases with each kill you make.

Kill everyone to win.

name: Keymaster
extra:
As the Keymaster, you have 2 stages.

Stage 1:
The Keymaster must mark every living player with a key by using their Kill button. To gain a key, the Keymaster has to simply enter a Vent.
After marking a player with a key, the Keymaster needs to Vent again to gain a new key.

Stage 2:
When the last needed player gets marked, the Keymaster gains a random shown colored key for a set duration of time. Additionally, the Keymaster their body color will switch repeatedly. The goal is to vent whenever the player's body color is equal to the key's color.

The Keymaster either wins when timing it correctly, or loses when timing it incorrectly.
They only have one chance!
(Higher Difficulty = Faster color swaps)

Extra:
