After beating both stages, by default, the Keymaster wins along with the other winners. They can also solo win depending on settings.

name: Laborer
extra: As the Laborer, you can mark a target, when someone kills the target, the Laborer will kill the target instead, live till the end while making sure Crewmates lose.

name: Lawyer
extra:
As the Lawyer, you have a target to defend, which will be indicated by a diamond 「♦」 next to their name.
If your target wins, you win.
If they lose, you lose.

name: Massacre
extra: As the Massacre, you are the transformed version of Contaminator when you contaminate everyone.

name: Maverick
description: Kill and survive to the end
extra:
As the Maverick, you can kill and, depending on options, Vent and have Impostor vision
If you survive until the end of the game, you win with the winning team.
Use your killing ability to eliminate threats to your life, but don't get voted out.

name: Mutant
extra: As the Mutant, you can shapeshift into any target.

name: Narc
extra:
As the Narc, your main objective is to reveal the Impostors. By using its Kill button, the Narc can check if the player is a Crewmate or Impostor. If the Narc reveals a Crewmate or Neutral, the Narc will turn into an Amnesiac, and the target will not die. If the Narc reveals an Impostor, they will kill the Impostor and leave no body behind and add the death reason 'Arrested'. If the Narc reveals all the Impostors it wins alone.
Note: If killing the last Impostor triggers another win, the Narc will not win.

name: Neutralized
description: You have been neutralized by the Neutralizer and therefore cannot use your role. Your role will be returned to you after this meeting.
extra: You have been neutralized by the Neutralizer and therefore cannot use your role. Your role will be returned to you after this meeting.

name: Opportunist
extra: As the Opportunist, your goal is to survive at the end of the game, the Opportunist will win with the winning player.

name: Pelican
extra: As the Pelican, you can use the Kill button to swallow a player alive, teleporting them off-bounds but not killing them yet. Those swallowed will only die if you're still alive at the end of the round. If you die or leave during the round, all alive swallowed players will spawn into the map where you were.

name: Pestilence
extra: (Apocalypse): As Pestilence, you're an unstoppable machine. Any attack towards you will be reflected towards them. Indirect kills don't even kill you. Only way to kill Pestilence is by voting them out or the Pestilence misguessing. Your presence is announced to everyone at the meeting after you transform.

name: Pickpocket
extra:
As the Pickpocket, you steal votes from your kills.

Kill everyone to win.

name: Pirate
extra:
As the Pirate, use your Kill button to select a target every round.
You will duel with your target in the next meeting. 
If both the Pirate and the target choose the same number, the Pirate wins.
Additionally, if the Pirate wins the duel or the target doesn't participate in the duel, the Pirate kills the target.

Dueling command: /duel X (where X can be 0, 1, or 2)

You win after winning a certain number of duels set by the Host.

Note: The kill would not count towards Pirate victory if the target did not participate in the duel.

name: Pixie
extra:
As the Pixie, mark up to an X amount of targets each round by using the Kill button on them. You must have one of the marked targets ejected when the meeting starts. If unsuccessful, you will commit suicide, except if you didn't mark any targets or all the targets are dead. The selected targets reset to 0 after the meeting ends. If you succeed, you will gain a point. You see all your targets in colored names.

You win with the winning team when you have certain amounts of points set by the Host.

name: Plague Scientist
extra:
(Plague Doctor from TOH)
As the Plague Scientist, your goal is to infect every living player.
They start by choosing one player to infect, after which anyone who spends a set amount of time in the range of the infected player becomes infected themselves.
Infection progress is cumulative and does not reset with distance or after meetings.

name: Plaguebearer
extra:
(Apocalypse):
As the Plaguebearer, plague everyone using your Kill button to turn into Pestilence.
Once you turn into Pestilence, you will become immortal and gain the ability to kill, and you will kill anyone who tries to kill you.

Also, when infected players interact with uninfected players, they will also be infected.

name: Predator
extra: As the Predator, you are assigned 3 prey. To hunt for your prey, use your kill button on any player. If their name remains white they are not one of the prey. If their name turns orange they are one of the prey. If you use your kill button on a player with an Orange name, they will die. Eliminate all the prey to win.

name: Prototype
extra: The Prototype can kill with a lower cooldown, but has a small chance to fail and kill itself as well.

name: Provocateur
extra: As the Provocateur, you can kill any target with the Kill button. If the target loses at the end of the game, the Provocateur wins with the winning team.

name: Punching Bag
description: Get attacked a few times to win!
extra:
As the Punching Bag, your goal is to get attacked a few times to win.

You cannot be guessed, as that adds to your attack count.

name: Pursuer
description: Protect yourself and live to the end!
extra:
As the Pursuer, you can use your ability on someone to make them misfire when they try to kill.

To win, survive to the end of the game.

name: Pyromaniac
extra: As the Pyromaniac, you can douse players (single click) or kill normally (double click). Dousing players do nothing immediately, but killing a doused player will significantly shorten your Kill Cooldown. To win, be the last player alive.

name: Quizmaster
description: Quiz people to kill them in meetings
extra:
As the Quizmaster, you can mark a player using your Kill button. In the next meeting, the marked player will have "?!" next to their name. The player will die if they answer the question wrong or doesn't answer. The player will live if the Quizmaster is killed/ejected in the same meeting.
The Quizmaster cannot mark multiple people in the same round

name: Repellant
extra: As the Repellant, you can Vent to temporarily shield yourself against killers. Live till the end to win.

name: Revenant
extra:
As the Revenant, your goal is to be killed. If you are killed, you will take your killer's role and kill your killer instead. You cannot win before being killed.
Note that Revenant only works when being directly killed.

name: Revolutionist
description: Recruit players to win with you
extra: As the Revolutionist, you can recruit players by clicking the Kill button on the player and following them until the Shield Animation plays for you. Recruiting has a chance, set by the Host, to kill players (though they are still recruited). When the required number of players are recruited (displayed next to your name), you must Vent within the specified time to win the game immediately with all your recruits. If you do not Vent in time, you lose and die.

name: Romantic
description: Protect your partner to win together
extra:
As the Romantic, you can pick their lover partner using their Kill button (this can be done at any point of the game). Once they've picked their partner, they can use their Kill button to give their partner a temporary shield that protects them from attacks. If their lover partner dies, the Romantic's role will change according to the following conditions:
1. If their partner was an Impostor, the Romantic becomes the Refugee
2. If their partner was a Neutral Killer, then they become Ruthless Romantic.
3. If their partner was a Crewmate or a non-killing Neutral, the Romantic becomes the Vengeful Romantic. 

The Romantic wins with the winning team if their partner wins.
Note: If your role changes, your win condition will be changed accordingly

name: Rulebook
description: Enforce the standards of Among Us
extra:
When the Rulebook single clicks their kill button on a non-impostor player that has a kill button, that player is stripped of their kill button and turned into a vanilla crewmate or Opportunist. If used on a task-based role, nothing happens. If used on a Coven with the necronomicon, transformed neutral apocalypse, or any role that has defense that can kill back, the Rulebook is killed immediately. If the Rulebook lives till the end of the game, they win. The rulebook can double click to kill normally. The rule book can also erase the kill button of the person that killed them.
Additionally, the Rulebook cannot be erased by OIIAI.

name: Ruthless Romantic
description: Kill everyone to win with your partner
extra: As the Ruthless Romantic, you change your roles from Romantic if your partner (a Neutral Killer) is killed. As a Ruthless Romantic, you win if you kill everyone and are the last one standing. If you win, your dead partner will also win with you.

name: Schrodingers Cat
description: The Cat is both alive and dead until observed.
extra:
As Schrodingers Cat, if someone attempts to use the Kill button on you, you will block the action and join their team. This blocking ability works only once. By default, you don't have a victory condition, meaning you win only after switching teams.
In Addition to this, you will be counted as nothing in the game.

Note: If the Killing Machine attempts to use their Kill button on you, the interaction is not blocked, and you will die.

name: Secret Agent
extra: As the Secret Agent, you must complete your tasks without anyone near you, or else you die. Complete all of your tasks to win.

name: Seeker
description:
Play Hide & Seek with your target
Your target has a ★ mark.
extra:
As the Seeker, use your Kill button to tag the target. If the Seeker tags the wrong player, a point is deducted, and if the Seeker tags the correct player, a point will be added.
Additionally, the Seeker will not be able to move for 5 seconds after every meeting and after getting a new target.

The Seeker needs to collect a certain number of points set by the Host to win.
Seeker will see a ★ mark on target's name.

name: Serial Killer
extra: As the Serial Killer, you win if you are the last player alive.

name: Shade
extra: As the Shade, you have no abilities when you are alive. You can select up to a certain amount of alive players to possess (adding them the Shaded Modifier) with your protect button. You can use the protect button on a Shaded player again to possess them and control their body for a limited amount of time, but this reduces your total ability uses.

name: Shade
extra: As the Shade, you have no abilities when you are alive. You can select up to a certain amount of alive players to possess (adding them the Shaded Modifier) with your protect button. You can use the protect button on a Shaded player again to possess them and control their body for a limited amount of time, but this reduces your total ability uses.

name: Shadow King
description: Use the dead to your advantage
extra:
As the Shadow King, when you are killed for the first time, you come back to life as another player. That player will become dead and lose their role.
Additionally, you can make dead players do your deeds for you. By shapeshifting, a random dead player will come back to life, kill the target, and then die again. Kill everyone to win.

name: Shaman
description: Deflect all the attacks on Voodoo Doll
extra:
As the Shaman, you can use your Kill button to select a Voodoo Doll once per round. If the Kill button is used on you, the effect will be deflected onto the Voodoo Doll.
If you survive until the end, you win with the winning team.
Note: If the killer cannot kill the chosen target, murder is canceled, but if the killer rechecks the Shaman, the killer will kill the Shaman.

name: Shocker
extra: As the Shocker, you can mark rooms by doing tasks in them, and then Vent to electrocute anyone in those rooms for a set period of time. When you complete all your tasks, you get new ones. Note: Doing tasks during that period will mark them for the next ability use.

name: Shroud
description: Shroud players to make them kill
extra:
As the Shroud, you do not kill normally.
Instead, use your Kill button to shroud a player.
Shrouded players kill others.
If the shrouded player doesn't make a kill, they'll kill themselves after a meeting.

Shroud sees shrouded players with a 「◈」mark next to their name.
Shrouded players who did not make a kill will also have the 「◈」mark in meetings, where they'll die if the Shroud is alive by the end of the meeting.

name: Sidekick
extra:
As the Sidekick, your job is to help the Jackal kill everyone.
You and the Jackal win together.
Depending on the settings, you may turn into Jackal if old Jackal was killed.
You may not be able to kill until old Jackal is dead.

name: Skeleton
description: Blind players just by approaching them
extra: As the Skeleton, you can kill players. If enough of your bodies are reported, you will win the game.

name: Slaad
description: Suck the life out of your targets
extra: The Slaad can use their kill button to suck the life out of a player. First, after a set amount of time, the target's vision and speed is reduced by a certian amount. Then after one meeting, the target turns gray. After another meeting, the target dies, and the Slaad's kill cooldown is reduced by a certain amount. Double click to kill normally, but your kill cooldown does not reduce. The killed players from your ability will have the Drained death reason.

name: Slayer
description: Do tasks to kill in bursts
extra: As the Slayer, when you complete a task, all other players around them will be killed.

name: Solsticer
extra:
As the Solsticer, you won't die, and you win by finishing all your tasks in a single round. After every meeting finishes, your tasks reset, and you need to start all over again.
Votes on the Solsticer will be directly canceled.
Kill attempts on the Solsticer will teleport it out of the map like Pelican until the meeting is finished.
The killer's Kill Cooldown will be reset to 10 seconds.
Solsticer is counted as nothing in Game.

name: Sonic
extra: As the Sonic, you can Unshift to be faster for a short amount of time. You will also be immune to any attack.

name: Sorcerer
description: Mark players and win if they die
extra: As the Sorcerer, you can mark 2 people. Once both of the marked players are dead and there are 3 players alive, the Sorcerer wins alone. The Sorcerer can only kill the marked players.

name: Soul Collector
extra:
(Apocalypse):
As Soul Collector, you can use your Kill button on a player to predict their death. You will gain a Soul if your target dies in the round you select them or the meeting after.
Your target resets after each meeting or after they die, whichever comes first. 

Once you collect the configurable amount of Souls, you become Death. If the gain passive Souls setting is enabled, you will gain a Soul each meeting.

name: Specter
description: Get killed and finish your tasks to win!
extra:
As the Specter, your job is to get killed and finish your tasks.
You can do your tasks while alive.
You cannot win if you're alive.
If you get killed, you win with the winning team if your tasks are completed.

name: Spiritcaller
extra: As the Spiritcaller, your victims become Evil Spirits after they die. These spirits can help you win by freezing other players briefly or blocking their vision. Alternatively, the spirits can give you a shield that protects you briefly from an attempted kill.

name: Stalker
description: Descend into the darkness, release fear!
extra: As the Stalker, you can kill anyone, and every kill will immediately cause a Lights Sabotage (if Lights Sabotage is already active, nothing will happen). Stalker cannot Vent. If the Impostor wins while the Stalker is alive or the Crewmate wins by killing the Impostors (according to the Host's setting, the Stalker may also win when the Crewmate wins by killing the Neutrals), then the Stalker wins alone.

name: Sunnyboy
extra:
As the Sunnyboy, you win if you are dead by the end of the game. The game will not end when you are alive due to killers gaining the majority.
Additionally, you have access to portable Vitals.

name: Swan
description: Kill players and then eat the bodies
extra: As the Swan, you can kill a player, then report the body to make it unreportable for everyone else. Kill everyone to win.

name: Taskinator
extra:
As the Taskinator, whenever you finish a task, the task will be bombed. When another player completes the bombed task, the bomb will detonate, and the player will die.

You win if you survive till the end and Crewmates don't win.

 Note: Taskinator bombs ignore all protection.

name: Terrorist
extra: As the Terrorist, when you die after completing all tasks, the Terrorist wins the game alone. (They can win by either being voted out or killed).

name: Trainee
extra:
As the Trainee, you have tasks. When you complete all of your tasks, you can kill players. Kill everyone to win.

You can only win after tasks are complete.

name: Trainee
extra:
As the Trainee, you have tasks. When you complete all of your tasks, you can kill players. Kill everyone to win.

You can only win after tasks are complete.

name: Traitor
extra:
As the Traitor, you were an Impostor that betrayed the Impostors.
You know the Impostors, but they don't know you.
The twist? They can kill you, but you can't kill them.

Eliminate the Impostors by other means, then kill everyone else to win!

name: Troller
description: Make random event by complete task
extra:
As a Troller, you can complete tasks so that random events can happen to players.
For example, changing the speed of all players, teleportation, influencing Sabotage, etc.
Also you can win with the winning team.

name: Undead
description: Kill players to win with the Wight
extra: As an Undead, you win and die with the Wight. Everyone knows who you are, you cannot be guessed. You get slower every round.

name: Vaporizer
description: Leave no trace with your kills
extra: As the Vaporizer, your kills will not leave dead bodies. Additionaly, vaporized players will have the 'Vaporized' death reason.

name: Vector
extra: As the Vector, your goal is to win alone by Venting a certain number of times.

name: Vengeful Romantic
description: Revenge your partner to win together
extra: As the Vengeful Romantic, you change your roles from Romantic if your partner (a Crewmate or non-Neutral Killer) is killed. As a Vengeful Romantic, your goal is to avenge your partner, which means you must kill the killer of your partner. If you succeed, then you and your partner win with the winning team at the end. If you try to kill someone other than your partner's killer, then you will die by misfire.

name: Virus
extra: As the Virus, your goal is to kill or infect all other players. When the Virus murders a Crewmate, their corpse is infected with a virus. The Crewmate who reports this corpse is infected joins the virus team or dies at the end of the meeting if the Virus doesn't get voted out, depending on the settings. If more players are on the Virus team than the Crewmate team, the Virus team wins.

name: Volatile
description: Get protected with each kill but your cooldown rises
extra: As the Volatile, your kill cooldown rises with every kill. However, you will be immortal for a certian duration after your kill. Kill everyone to win.

name: Vulture
description: Eat bodies by reporting to win
extra:
As the Vulture, report bodies to win!

When you report a body, if your Eat Cooldown is up, you'll eat the body (makes it unreportable).
If your eat ability is still on Cooldown, then you'll report the body normally.

Additionally, you'll report bodies normally if the maximum bodies eaten per round is reached.

name: War
extra: (Apocalypse): As the War, you are invincible, have a lower Kill Cooldown, and can kill anyone with your previous powers. Your presence is announced to everyone at the meeting after you transform.

name: Werewolf
extra:
As the Werewolf, you can kill much like any killer.
However, when you kill, any nearby players also die.
Any player who dies to this will have their death reason as Mauled.

To balance this, you have a higher Kill Cooldown than anyone else.

name: Widow
extra: As the Widow you were once a Lover. Now you are a Neutral killer. Kill everyone to win with your Lover.

name: Wight
extra:
The Wight can use their kill button to kill a player, then will be revived after a meeting to kill for them as Undead. Undead players will get slower every meeting. Undead players will die after the meeting where the Wight is dead.
Undead players win with the Wight.

name: Workaholic
description: Complete all tasks to win solo!
extra: As the Workaholic, you win alone when you complete all tasks. Depending on the Host's settings, you can only win if you are alive and or revealed to everyone at the beginning (these settings are rarely both on).

name: Wraith
extra: As the Wraith, you can Vent to Vanish temporarily. You will still appear visible on your screen. Vent again to become visible. You win if you are the last player remaining.

name: Conjurer
extra: As the Conjurer, you can Shapeshift once to mark a location. Shapeshift again to conjure a meteor at the place you marked, killing everyone in the radius. With the Necronomicon, you can kill. You can also mark a player using the Shapeshift UI. When the Conjurer clicks the Shapeshift button again, all the players in the radius of the marked player will die, including the marked player.

name: Coven Leader
description: Help your teammates by retraining them
extra: The Coven Leader can use their Kill button on a fellow Coven member to retrain them into a random Coven role that isn’t currently in the game. During the next meeting, that Coven member will be notified that the Coven Leader wishes to retrain them. They can vote themselves to accept the retrain, or vote otherwise to deny it. Denying the retrain does not take away an ability usage. With the Necronomicon, you cannot retrain, and can only kill other players.

name: Harvester
extra: As the Harvester, you can use the Shapeshift UI to pick two players. These players will have their Modifiers swapped upon the next meeting. While the Harvester is alive, every player killed by a Coven member will have a configurable amount of their Modifiers stolen by their killer. With the Necronomicon, the Harvester can kill. While the Harvester is alive, every player killed by a non-Coven member will have a configurable amount of their Modifiers stolen and given to the Harvester.

name: Hex Master
description: Hex players to kill them in meetings
extra: The Hex Master can use their Kill button to mark a player with a symbol. If a player has this at the end of the meeting and the Hex Master hasn't died - then they die. With the Necronomicon, the Hex will be passed around - similar to an Agitator bomb. Also, you can double-click the Kill button to kill normally.

name: Illusionist
description: Place Illusions on players to spread confusion!
extra: As the Illusionist, you can use your Kill button on a player to reverse the results of any investigative role. For example, if someone with a Kill button is Illusioned, they will appear not to have a Kill button to the Investigator, and vice versa. Illusions wear off after meetings. With the Necronomicon, you may double-click to kill. Every kill you make appears as a random death reason.

name: Jinx
description: Players "accidentally" die upon trying to kill your target
extra: The Jinx can use their Kill button to jinx a player. Anyone who interacts with the jinxed player will die with the death reason Jinxed. With the Necronomicon the Jinx can double-kill to kill normally. Also, the jinxed player and the player who interacted with the jinxed person will die.

name: Medusa
description: Stop players in their tracks by Stoning them
extra: The Medusa can use their Kill button on players to mark them as Stoned. When the Medusa clicks the Shapeshift button, all Stoned players will be unable to move and will have reduced vision for a configurable amount of time. With the Necronomicon, killed players will be unreportable.

name: Moon Dancer
description: Use Baton Pass to give out Modifiers!
extra: As the Moon Dancer, you can use your Kill button to use their ability, Baton Pass. If used on a Coven member: Gives a Helpful Modifier at the next meeting. If used on a non-Coven member: Gives a Harmful Modifier at the next meeting. With the Necronomicon, the Moon Dancer can double-click their Kill button to kill. When killing, the player is teleported off the map. They will appear alive on Vitals and will not show up in Tracefinder's arrows etc. They die when a meeting/body report with the death reason Blasted Off.

name: Necromancer
description: Use the dead to your advantage
extra: As the Necromancer, you can Shapeshift to become the role of a random dead person for a set duration. Some roles can not be used. Once a role is used, it can not be used the rest of the game. With the Necronomicon, when someone tries to kill you, you will block the kill and be teleported to a random Vent. You have a limited time to kill your killer. If the time runs out or you try to kill someone else, you die.

name: Poisoner
description: Make players unable to use their ability
extra: The Poisoner can use their Kill button on a player to roleblock them. The next time the roleblocked player tries to use their ability, it will do nothing, and their Cooldown will be reset. With the Necronomicon, you can double-click to kill. These kills will be delayed.

name: Potion Master
description: Use your potions to your advantage
extra: As the Potion Master, you have two potions available for their use. The Reveal potion reveals a player's role. The Barrier potion places a shield on a player for one round, the player will not be notified of this unless they are Coven as well. Click the Shapeshift button to change potions. With the Necronomicon, the Potion Master can double-click their Kill button to kill.

name: Ritualist
description: Perform Blood Rituals to Enchant other players!
extra: As the Ritualist, during a meeting, you can perform a Blood Ritual to guess a player’s exact role. If the Ritualist is correct, that player will be converted to Coven. If the Ritualist is incorrect, they will not die but will be unable to Blood Ritual until the next meeting. The command is /rt id role. With the Necronomicon, the Ritualist can kill.

name: Sacrifist
description: Debuff your enemies at your own cost
extra: As the Sacrifist, you can Shapeshift to cause a random debuff to a non-Coven member, however, the Sacrifist will also receive this effect (when applicable). The random player will be the same player until the round ends. Depending on the Host’s settings, if the Sacrifist is voted out, some random non-Coven who voted the Sacrifist will die too. Normally, the Sacrifist can not kill, however, to prevent prolonging of the game, Sacrifist can kill if they are the last Coven member alive. With the Necronomicon, when you Shapeshift, you will commit the Ultimate Sacrifice. When you do this, you die. However, the entire Coven for the rest of the game receives a lowered Kill Cooldown.

name: Umbra
description: Protect the coven at the expense of others
extra: The Umbra can select a player to sacrifice with their kill button. When any Coven member is attacked, the Coven member and selected player will swap places, and the selected player will be attacked instead. With the Necronomicon, the Umbra can kill the player directly and add a shield to the Coven team, with one total use.

name: Voodoo Master
description: Craft Voodoo Dolls of other players!
extra: As the Voodoo Master, you can craft a Voodoo Doll of a player by using their Kill button, similar to the Shaman. All the interactions with you using Kill button will be deflected to the Voodoo Doll and the Voodoo Doll will destroy. Unlike the Shaman, this voodoo will last during the meeting (eg. If the Voodoo Master is judged, then the voodoo'd player will be judged instead). With the Necronomicon, you can double-click to kill. Additionally, the voodoo’d player will be unable to report. The next person to interact with them will die.

name: Witch Doctor
description: Recruit players and cure them from their Modifiers
extra: As the Witch Doctor, you can convert an amount of players set by the Host into Coven members, while also removing all Harmful Modifiers. With the Necronomicon, the Witch Doctor can also double click to kill normally.

name: Admired
description: The Admirer chose you as their love
extra:
(Betrayal Modifiers):
As an Admired player, you win with the Crewmates and not your original team.

You can see the Admirer.

name: Antidote
description: Decrease the Cooldown of the player who interacts with you
extra: As the Antidote, when someone tries to use their Kill button on you, their Cooldown will be decreased by a configurable amount of time.

name: Autopsy
extra:
As the Autopsy, you can see how people died.

Cannot be assigned to Doctor, Tracefinder, Scientist, or Sunnyboy.

name: Avenger
description: You take someone with you upon death
extra: Host can set whether the Impostor can become an Avenger. When the Avenger is killed (voted out, and irregular kills will not count), the Avenger will revenge a random player.

name: Aware
extra: As the Aware, you get a notification in the next meeting if a revealing role had interacted with you.

name: Bait
extra: As the Bait, when you die, the murderer who killed the Bait will self-report the Bait's body. However, this won't happen when a Scavenger, Cleaner, Swooper, Wraith, Medusa, or Killing Machine kills the Bait. The report may have a delay according to the Host's settings.

name: Beartrap
description: Freeze your killer for a few seconds
extra: As the Beartrap, when you die, Beartrap immobilizes killer for a configurable amount of time.

name: Bewilder
description: A twist of vision, a web of confusion
extra: As the Bewilder, you may have a smaller/bigger vision. When the Bewilder has died, the murderer's vision may become the same as the Bewilder's, depending on the settings.

name: Blessed
description: Get a shield at the start of a round
extra: The Blessed gets a shield at the start of every round except the first that lasts for a certain amount of time. The shield will not work if not enough players are alive

name: Bloodthirst
extra:
As the Bloodthirst, doing tasks allows you to become bloodthirsty and kill players.
When you finish a task, the next player you come in contact with dies.

Your Bloodthirst remains after a meeting.
Upon making a kill, your Bloodthirst clears till the next task you complete.
Bloodthirsts do not stack.

Only assigned to Crewmates with tasks.

name: Bounty
extra: The Bounty will receive a green $ symbol next to their name for everyone to see. When the Bounty is killed, it is likely the killer will receive a positive effect, but there is also a chance the killer receives a negative effect.

name: Burst
extra: As the Burst, your killer explodes if they aren't inside a Vent after a set amount of time.

name: Chronos
description: Your very existence bends meeting time
extra:
As Chronos, your presence warps how meetings play out.
If you call the meeting, the discussion timer is halved for a rushed trial.
If someone else calls a meeting while you are alive, the discussion timer is extended instead, dragging out the deliberation.
A subtle icon appears next to your name during meetings, hinting at your modifier without revealing its exact effect.

name: Circumvent
extra:
As the Circumvent, you can't Vent.

Only assigned to Impostors.

name: Clumsy
description: You have a chance to miss your kill
extra:
As the Clumsy, you have a chance to miss your kill.

When you miss, your Cooldown is reset, and the target remains untouched.

Only assigned to killers.

name: Concealed
description: You take too long to report
extra: When the Concealed is reported, the report is delayed by a certain amount of time.

name: Cyber
extra:
As the Cyber, you cannot die while in a group.
Depending on the settings, Impostors, Neutrals, and or Crewmates will know if you die.

name: Diseased
description: Increase the Cooldown of the player who interacts with you
extra: As the Diseased, when someone tries to use their Kill button on you, their Cooldown will be increased by a configurable amount of time.

name: Disregarded
extra: With the Disregarded Modifier, your corpse will be unreportable.

name: Distracted
description: Slow down whem players are near you
extra: When the Distracted is near someone, their speed will be reduced.

name: Double Shot
description: You have an extra life when guessing
extra: When a player with Double Shot guesses a role incorrectly, they will get a second chance to guess, but the next wrong guess will result in suicide.

name: Eavesdropper
extra: As the Eavesdropper, you have a chance to read other Role/Modifier information-based messages like Mortician or Sleuth.

name: Egoist
extra:
As the Egoist, if your team wins, the Egoist wins instead of their team.
Madmates and Neutrals won't be Egoist.

name: Enchanted
extra:
(Betrayal Modifiers):
The Enchanted Modifier can only be obtained through being converted by the Ritualist or upon killing the OIIAI as a non-Nerconomicon holder.
Once Enchanted, you are apart of the Coven team and are no longer apart of your original team.

name: Evader
description: You have a chance not to be exiled!
extra: As the Evader, When you get voted out, there is a chance they will not get ejected. (Chance set by the Host.)

name: Evil Spirit
extra: As an Evil Spirit, it's your job to help the Spiritcaller to victory. You can use your Haunt button to freeze players and reduce their vision. Alternatively, you can use your Haunt button to give the Spiritcaller a shield against a kill attempt temporarily.

name: Explosive
description: Bomb a player at your death
extra: When the Explosive dies, the killer will receive a bomb, that they can pass to others. After a certain amount of time the player with the bomb dies

name: Extra Life
extra: As the Extra Life, you will not be killed for the first time you are killed.

name: Flash
extra: As the Flash, your default movement speed is faster than others. (speed depends on the setting of the Host)

name: Fool
extra: Sleuth and Mechanic won't be Fool. Fools can't repair any Sabotage.

name: Forgetful
description: Forget the tasks you have done
extra: The Forgetful's tasks will reset after every meeting.

name: Fragile
description: Die instantly if someone uses the Kill button on you
extra: As the Fragile, you will instantly die if someone tries to use the Kill button on you (even if the role cannot directly kill).

name: Fragile Hunter
extra: As the Fragile Hunter, if you kill the Fragile, you automatically win the game.

name: Gambler
description: Kill your killer or go bust!
extra: As the Gambler, you have a 50/50 chance to either kill your killer or die. The role will be removed after you burn your ability uses.

name: Ghoul
extra:
As the Ghoul, one of two outcomes can occur on task completion.

If alive: Suicide
If dead: You kill your killer if they're alive.

This is only assigned to Crewmates, and not Crewmates with no tasks or are task-based.

name: Glow
extra: As the Glow, during lights out, you and players nearby you will receive a vision boost.

name: Gravestone
description: Your role is revealed when you die
extra: As the Gravestone, your role is revealed to everyone when you die.

name: Gross
extra: As the Gross, your body will reappear after every meeting in the same place, and not be reportable after the first meeting. This happens because you are so gross no one will want to clean you up.

name: Guesser
description: Guess roles of players in meetings to kill
extra:
As a Guesser, guess the roles of players in meetings to kill them.
Guessing the incorrect role kills you instead.
The guessing command is: /bt [player ID] [role]
You can see the player's id before the player's name or use the /id command to view the id of all players.

name: Hurried
description: God, I got too much stuff!
extra:
As the hurried, you must complete all your tasks to win with your team! If you fail with your tasks, you lose.
Hurried hurries to his goal, so it won't get Madmate, Charmed or so.

name: Identifier
description: Find killers based on their color
extra:
As the Identifier, when reporting a body, you will get a message in meeting saying if the Killer has a lighter color
(Pink, Yellow, White, Cyan, Lime, Rose, Banana, Gray, Coral) or darker color(Blue, Red, Green, Orange, Black, Purple, Brown, Maroon, Tan).

name: Influenced
extra:
As the Influenced, your vote will be forced to the player with the most votes.
Influenced vote won't be counted while choosing the exiled player'
Note that your vote skill still functions on the player you voted first
If all the alive players are Influenced, then the vote result won't shift
Collector cannot become Influenced.

name: Lab Rat
extra:
Every meeting, your role basis changes. Your basis could be:

Engineer basis
Scientist basis
Tracker basis
Noisemaker basis
Detective basis

name: Lag
extra: The Lag's kills are delayed by 1 second.

name: Last Impostor
extra: This special effect is given to the last surviving Impostor. It significantly reduces their Kill Cooldown.

name: Lazy
extra: As the Lazy, you are assigned a single short task and are immune to Warlocks, Puppeteers, and Gangsters.

name: Lovers
extra: Lovers are a combination of two players. The Lovers win when they are the last ones standing, and their victory is shared. When one of the Lovers wins, the other also wins together. Lovers can see the 「♥」 next to each other's name. If one of the Lovers dies, the other will die in love (may not die in love according to the Host's settings). When one of the Lovers is exiled in the meeting, the other will die and become a dead body that cannot be reported.

name: Loyal
extra:
As the Loyal, you cannot be recruited by roles such as Jackal or Cultist.

Cannot be assigned to Neutrals.

name: Lucky
extra: As the Lucky, there is a probability for you to evade the kill; the Host sets the specific probability. The killer will see a Shield Animation when the evasion takes effect, but you will not know anything.

name: Madmate
extra:
Only Crewmates can become Madmate. Madmate's task is to help the Impostors win the game. Madmate will lose if all Impostors are killed/ejected. Madmates may know who are Impostors, and Impostors may know who are Madmates (Host settings).

Lazy Guy, Celebrity can't become Madmate. Sheriff, Snitch, Nice Guesser, Mayor, and Judge may become Madmate (Host settings). Skill changes when the following roles are converted into Madmates:

Time Manager => Doing tasks will reduce meeting time.
Bodyguard => Skill won't activate if the killer is an Impostor.
Grenadier => Flash bomb will work on Crewmates and Neutrals instead of the Impostors.
Sheriff => Can kill anyone, including Impostors (Host settings).
Nice Guesser => Can guess Crewmates and Neutrals
Psychic => All evil Neutrals and Crewmates' names with the ability to kill will be displayed in Red.
Judge => Can judge anyone
Pacifist => Their ability only works on Crewmates.

name: Mare
extra:
As the Mare, you have a low Kill Cooldown and have higher speed but can only kill during lights.

Additionally, your name will appear in red during lights.

Only assigned to Impostors and cannot be guessed.

name: Mimic
description: Reveal killed players' roles to Impostors upon death
extra:
As the Mimic, when you're dead, other Impostors will receive a message once a meeting is called. This message will include information on roles which the Mimic killed.
Only Impostors can become Mimic.
As mimic you will always see roles of dead players

name: Mundane
extra: As the Mundane, you can only guess once you complete all your tasks.

name: Necroview
description: See the team of the dead
extra:
As the Necroview, you can see the team of dead players. The following info will be displayed on the dead player's name while in a meeting:
- The Red name indicates the Impostors.
- The Cyan name indicates the Crewmates.
- The Gray name indicates the Neutrals.
- The Purple name indicates the Coven.

name: Nimble
extra:
As the Nimble, you gain access to the Vent button.

Only assigned to certain Crewmates.

name: OIIAI
extra:
As the OIIAI, when you die, you will make your killer forget their role.
Additionally, you may pass OIIAI on to the killer, depending on settings.

name: Oblivious
extra: Analyst and Cleaners won't be Oblivious. The Oblivious cannot report dead bodies. Note: Bait killed by Oblivious will still report automatically, and Oblivious can still be used as a scapegoat for Anonymous.

name: Onbound
extra: As the Onbound, you cannot be guessed in meetings.

name: Overclocked
extra:
As the Overclocked, your Kill Cooldown is reduced by a percentage.

This feature is only assigned to roles with a Kill button.

name: Paranoia
extra:
As the Paranoia, you will be considered as two players in the game to determine when the game ends due to killers having the majority. Additionally, this grants you an extra vote, depending on options.
Not assigned to Neutrals nor Madmates.

name: Peacemaker
extra: The Peacemaker can prevent all Impostor votes while they are alive.

name: Productive
description: Get notified when a task is done
extra: The Productive will receive a flash bang any time anyone does a task.

name: Prohibited
extra:
As the Prohibited, you have specific Vents that you can't use.
How many Vents are disabled depends on the Host's settings.

name: Quota
description: Kill a certian amount to win
extra: The Quota must kill a certian amount of people to win with their team.

name: Radar
extra: As the Radar, you have arrows pointing towards the closest person at all times.

name: Radiator
extra: For each second a player is near the Radiator, they will gain a point. While a player is not near the Radiator, they will lose a point. If the player has enough points, they will die.

name: Rage
description: Finish all your tasks to earn a kill button
extra:
As Rage, you are given extra tasks on top of your normal ones.
Once every task is complete - your original ones and the extra Rage tasks - you gain a kill button and can kill other players.

Only assigned to task-based Crewmates. Scientist-basis roles (Doctor, Tracefinder, etc.) can never be given Rage.

name: Rainbow
description: Colorful melodies! You don't even know your own color.
extra: As the Rainbow, you change your colors like crazy.

name: Randomizer
description: You're going to be someone's burden when you die?
extra:
As the Randomizer, when you die, your killer will do one of the following:
  1. Self-report your body
  2. Stand next to your body
  3. Have their Kill Cooldown set to 600s
  4. Randomly avenge a player.

name: Rascal
description: You appear evil in some cases
extra:
As the Rascal, you can die to the Sheriff, and Snitch can find you if Snitch can find Madmates.

Only assigned to Crewmates, cannot be assigned by the Merchant.

name: Reach
description: You have a longer kill range
extra:
(Modifier)
As the Reach, unlike everyone else, you have the longest kill range possible in the game.
Only roles with a Kill button can get this Modifier.

name: Rebirth
extra:
As the Rebirth, if you're the player about to be ejected, you will swap skins with a random Crewmate who voted for you.
Notice: The Host vote never counts
Rebirth will be removed from you if you exhausted all your rebirths.

name: Rebound
description: Guess me right, and face your plight!
extra:
As the Rebound, if a Guesser successfully guessed you or a Judge successfully judged you, they will die instead.
If a player with Double Shot guesses you correctly, they will die instantly.

name: Recruit
extra:
(Betrayal Modifiers):
As a Recruit, you are on the Jackal's team and help out the Jackal and their Sidekicks.
You cannot win with your original team.
Depending on the settings, you may turn into Jackal if old Jackal was killed and no Sidekicks is alive.

name: Redo
extra: When the Redo votes themself, they will change roles to a random role in their faction. This action can only be used once.

name: Residue
description: Players will know what room you were in
extra: When a meeting is called, the last room you were in is revealed to everyone.

name: Rookie
extra: Sometimes the Rookie fails to complete their tasks. If this happens, their tasks are reset

name: Rusher
description: Become faster by tasking or killing
extra: Every time the Rusher finishes a task/kill they become faster.

name: Seer
description: You are alerted when somebody has died
extra: As the Seer, whenever a player dies, you will see a kill-flash (a red flash, possibly accompanied by an alarm sound like Sabotage).

name: Shaded
description: You are controlled by the Shade
extra: You are recruited to the Shade's team, who is a dead player. They can choose to control your movement and actions at any time.

name: Silent
extra:
As the Silent, your vote icon won't appear on the result screen.
So nobody knows who you voted for.

name: Sleuth
extra:
As the Sleuth, you gain info from dead bodies.

Optionally, you may also gain the killer's role.

Not assigned to Analyst or Mortician.

name: Sloth
extra:
As the Sloth, your default movement speed is slower than others.
(Speed depends on the setting of the Host)

name: Snooze
extra: If you have the Snooze Add-On, there's a chance you can't report bodies. When you click report, you'll have a chance of not reporting the body. If you have failed at reporting, then you must wait to report again. There will be a cooldown on your report button, in which you will need to wait til the end of it to retry.

name: Soulless
extra:
When a Cursed Soul steals your soul, you get this Modifier.

You are not counted as alive.

name: Spurt
extra: When you start walking, you gain an enormous speed boost, which swiftly deteriorates, until you have to rest still for a while to rejuvenate your speed.

name: Statue
description: You're still as a rock around people
extra: As the Statue, whenever many people are near the Statue, the Statue is completely frozen or slowed down depending on the settings.

name: Stealer
extra:
As a Stealer, when you kill a player, the Stealer will get an additional vote (the Host sets the vote number, and the decimal is rounded down).
Also, extra votes from the Stealer are hidden during the meeting depending on the options.

name: Stubborn
extra:
As the Stubborn, Eraser can't erase your role, Cleanser can't cleanse you, Bandit can't steal from you, and Monarch can't knight you.
Additionally, you can't gain any new Modifiers from the Merchant.

name: Subversion
extra: The Subversion can sabotage as a non-Impostor role.

name: Susceptible
extra: As the Susceptible, your death reason will be random.

name: Swift
description: Your kills don't cause a lunge
extra:
As the Swift, you will not make any movement when you kill.
Note: Swift also ignores Bait

name: Tiebreaker
extra: As the Tiebreaker, a tie vote priority will be given to the target voted by the Tiebreaker. Note: If multiple Tiebreakers choose different tie targets simultaneously, the skills of the Tiebreaker will not take effect.

name: Tired
extra: As the Tired, Whenever you kill (or uses kill ability on) someone, alternatively whenever they finish a task, they will temporarily get lower vision and lower speed.

name: Torch
extra: As the Torch, you have maximum vision and is not affected by Lights Sabotage.

name: Toxic
description: No one wants to be near you
extra: When a player is near the Toxic for a certain amount of time, they will be transported to the closest vent.

name: Tricky
extra: As the Tricky, your kills will have a random death reason.

name: Underclocked
extra:
As the Underclocked, your Kill Cooldown is increased by a certain amount.

This Modifier is only assigned to roles with a Kill button.

name: Unlucky
description: Doing things has a chance to kill you
extra: As the Unlucky, when you Complete Tasks, Kill, Venting, or open a Door, you have a chance to die.

name: Valhalla
extra: When the Ragnarok kills you, they will not have their cooldown reset.

name: Void Ballot
extra: Holder of this Modifier will have 0 vote count.

name: Watcher
description: You see all the colors of votes
extra: As a Watcher, during the meeting, you can see everyone's votes.

name: Web
extra: When the Web's body is reported, the body will fail to report, and the reporter will be frozen.

name: Windy
extra: Whenever a player is close to the Windy, the Windy will have a speed boost.

name: Workhorse
description: Be the first to complete all tasks and get more
extra: As the Workhorse, you are the first player to complete all the tasks will become Workhorse, and Workhorse will give the player extra tasks. The Host sets the number of additional tasks.

name: YouTuber
extra:
As the YouTuber, When you are the first player to die in the game, the YouTuber will win alone. If the YouTuber does not meet the win conditions, the YouTuber will follow the Crewmate to win. Note: Indirect killing methods such as being exiled, being guessed by the Guesser, etc., will not trigger the skills of the YouTuber.
Only Crewmates will become YouTuber.
